subject: "Everyone Around Here Supports Canning"

Hi everyone, We are now just 8 days away from our election and I wanted to share a few stories from these final days of our campaign that really show the power of what we've built with your support: On Saturday I was working late in our headquarters on West 6th in Eugene, and got to chatting with a neighbor. He lives in the nearby motel room with his wife and four children. He shared that he is of African American, Native American, and Latino heritage, and has struggled against the racism in Eugene. He really wants to move his family out of the Motel, but they've had trouble finding a place they can afford. I said, "That's why I'm running." He said, "Oh I know. We've all checked out your website. Everyone around here, in his neighborhood, supports you. We need you to win." On Sunday, my husband Justin was delivering signs in the more rural communities around Philomath, Sweet Home, Albany, and Corvallis. He pulled up in front of the home of the supporters who had requested a sign, parking across the street. He opened the trunk of the car, and started assembling the sign, and a woman appeared from a neighboring yard and said, "Excuse me, are you delivering signs for Canning? We'd like one too!" After chatting with her, Justin learned that this neighbor and her spouse were strong supporters who had no connection to the original folks from across the street. In fact, they didn't know each other at all, but she just said laughing, "You know, all the Bernie people out here are with Canning." From the Whittaker and West Eugene, to the rolling hills of Sweet Home and Philomath, we have built a powerful coalition that is demanding real change. We are fighting for housing, healthcare as a human right, and representation that isn't bought by billionaires. We have built this movement from the grassroots, with a message of optimism and courage, that "It's Time to Take a Stand." We've got 8 more days to make sure that every vote is cast. With the chaos of the pandemic, texting reminders and calling voters is more vital than ever. But these tactics aren't free, and we need your support to keep the phones buzzing. [Please donate whatever you can today. ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/HwE/ni0YAA/t.31p/W-z6p-8KR_ugzJ3am_96yA/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNLKfMVBcsdNWxsekRveoNXMpsVOSTpGvdRlRUljrBOP7RRNYUelOdO96xX3NAkGq9qHo3qwLbWKGaC6gWbN2BThp9zSvNNSsEGxOdY8TdB6uWmcbrTyXo7RCGefRlAYo4ExSh4F9QD6TgI3aehsTVcvwZxn5VQf6VLZnrnRQbOkQFH8dPHCMcfpQ9DICzZKyy5mBZPNtXpfgd-2FZ-2B6SqamXTbMVcdIur5M7T6gFllwbgzUicp8644haEjPfoUCwJMm2IktiP9H2hqvTFmz-2BgcVenSXvmKkREWOEjTNuYTlT9axqfTelFB6KOvNUs69-2BWUZqWC4fcYSvvMU7-2F5DvRc6n42-2BtYTV82XPOLwFY2xsPq6A-3D-3D/SVpR)

This morning, I was speaking as a guest in a class at the University of Oregon via zoom. A young student asked me, "How do you deal with all the backlash and negativity against you?" I told her that I take it as a sign of our power: "Never let haters make you feel like you're doing something wrong for taking a stand for what is right." If we were not mounting such an effective challenger campaign, we would not be getting such vitriol and hate. It is a signal that we're doing well, and a sign to keep on going. Thank you to everyone who has chipped in from our emails, calls, and texts of the past few days. We're really close to meeting our goal. If you can donate anything at all, [now is the moment when we must put all the chips on the table](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/HwE/ni0YAA/t.31p/W-z6p-8KR_ugzJ3am_96yA/h8/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNLKfMVBcsdNWxsekRveoNXMHl6fSwKpF5zeuJsD-2BnqZyIBzPlm2GMCeIic6q9ppr9t3g2Sdq2BB2c5mF5siQr2-2BIZF-2FXqh7gvyNoWNsJFJsCnykcNc4KNizgAm05E54c-2FgmX1QCFgXPzm8UESdKp5VMMAxsLa1ZMFZEtC-2FvszKzfmklkppja8RDwF1fHTAoXwHPkubRZx5q5D2gKJL6PchFlh8hWbCoz5r39FduF1cVzd-2BkukAB8sSTvZQ0NorVjJ-2BjNy8kff3spmosd-2BtpdaC7kigfP9lJNyxR0s-2F8T7gd8BRsw2fmXZk6Jyv6ILo-2BACC5N4Olifvy956yJOqpWFHAwRXh9gz7zkCrWhAxwVT-2Fgw-3D-3D/FfGS). name: Christy Smith
subject: What's on my mind the night before the election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Hi Peter --

The night before polls close is always one of the most stressful moments of an election.

What I'm thinking about most right now is how we make sure everyone returns their ballot by 8 p.m. tomorrow night. Our right to vote is so sacred, and I want to make sure everyone's voice is heard in this critically important election.

**That's why we want to keep making phone calls, sending text messages, and posting digital ads in these final 24 hours.**

**[If you can, please chip in $5 right now. The hours are winding down, and we need to do everything we can in these final moments to turn out as many voters as we can before it's too late.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbc9/29776869/99aa2dd/569f1426/3985036865/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTFfQ2hyaXN0eUVsZWN0aW9uRXZlLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200511_ChristyElectionEve-full")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbc9/29776869/99aa2dd/569f1427/3985036865/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTFfQ2hyaXN0eUVsZWN0aW9uRXZlLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200511_ChristyElectionEve-full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbc9/29776869/99aa2dd/569f1420/3985036865/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTFfQ2hyaXN0eUVsZWN0aW9uRXZlLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200511_ChristyElectionEve-full&express_lane=true&amount=25")

Christy

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Reopening restaurants for outdoor dining
body:
Your daily Rhode Island COVID-19 update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
I hope that you are safe and well, and that you enjoyed the first weekend after I lifted Rhode Island's sat at home order. I'm proud that over the weekend we were able to start to reopen non-critical retail with capacity restrictions. I know a lot of folks are anxious to hear what's next for restaurants, and I have good news to share on that front.
Today, I want to tell you about how restaurants will be able to safely reopen for outdoor dining as soon as next week.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mwO3Rdv9tB4pHdn4HVsqTFeLXFOQyCVPiU3sE8jz8ECrotF2AGngiAlbxwkJVN9a6joOzTcH1zOoHI51VRxUgVjOS6p4Y2OcyRE0FhOauui8QhoT4pEYZJqWreuILXlyu78sm49pg0rMCESvVvQilC8bDTmSHuJEPB1XtvMKLdDIatRJdMs_3RrOnaFYjqVq9TVmGTGefFI=&c=dJ-xuYNVnHZ_15Vn_sxUeyMxgtbXDHNQBUVfRH4P_aIJUquqeHyXtQ==&ch=CL3qgASyVjK3hJHVe7Mgw2kW4I8wwPIYpJlP5poK94Q9cg-9RUaOLw==)
---
| To stay up to date with Rhode Island's latest COVID-19 statistics, please check the Department of Health's [new data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mwO3Rdv9tB4pHdn4HVsqTFeLXFOQyCVPiU3sE8jz8ECrotF2AGngiAlbxwkJVN9a6joOzTcH1zOoHI51VRxUgVjOS6p4Y2OcyRE0FhOauui8QhoT4pEYZJqWreuILXlyu78sm49pg0rMCESvVvQilC8bDTmSHuJEPB1XtvMKLdDIatRJdMs_3RrOnaFYjqVq9TVmGTGefFI=&c=dJ-xuYNVnHZ_15Vn_sxUeyMxgtbXDHNQBUVfRH4P_aIJUquqeHyXtQ==&ch=CL3qgASyVjK3hJHVe7Mgw2kW4I8wwPIYpJlP5poK94Q9cg-9RUaOLw==) for all the information you need about the spread of coronavirus in Rhode Island.
---
| A week from today - May 18 - restaurants will be able to begin limited outdoor dining in addition to their take-out, delivery and drive-through operations.
As we've been saying, going to a restaurant is going to look and feel a bit different now. To give you an idea now, among the new rules everyone will have to follow:

* Dining will be by reservation only and groups may not exceed 5 people in accordance with social gathering limits.
* Tables must be spaced at least 8-feet apart or separated by barriers, and no more than 20 tables total will be allowed in any outdoor space
* We're going to eliminate shared objects in favor of things like one-time-use paper menus, disposable utensils, and cashless and contactless payment methods.
* All high-traffic areas will have to be frequently cleaned. Tables and chairs will be sanitized in between parties.

There are more specific rules and regulations we'll ask restaurants to follow, which you can find on [reopeningri.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mwO3Rdv9tB4pHdn4HVsqTFeLXFOQyCVPiU3sE8jz8ECrotF2AGngiHsJrt2YqGiMQckF7CuvlG9tbBNQ6Kq34dSmiaWbt2FUkkGp8ApkVUGBpuuGTcJa0m6SKY9-f7-NAsAxYqJ48gBPZllZwfePxA==&c=dJ-xuYNVnHZ_15Vn_sxUeyMxgtbXDHNQBUVfRH4P_aIJUquqeHyXtQ==&ch=CL3qgASyVjK3hJHVe7Mgw2kW4I8wwPIYpJlP5poK94Q9cg-9RUaOLw==). The most important rule, however, is for the diners: stay home if you feel sick. I know that it's hard and that you want to go out, but you have to put the health of your friends, neighbors, and family first.
We expect this outdoor dining approach to continue for at least a few weeks before we advance to indoor restaurant dining. The soonest we're likely to authorize indoor dining is June 1. I'm saying this now because we want to encourage restaurants to give outdoor dining a try if they feel they're ready. We know some restaurants won't want to reopen with outdoor dining and that's fine; others don't have outdoor space and will want to explore the use of their parking lots, nearby parks, sidewalks and even streets for this purpose.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mwO3Rdv9tB4pHdn4HVsqTFeLXFOQyCVPiU3sE8jz8ECrotF2AGngiN-KsU75LkfJDK8uXDaPGA0MBE20gaSO-MTWiZnY7Fc930StxVUdKZYu1VRHfRe_6nzXPfb-3DUGpHMfWTo9C_QX0Hp9U9Y8AjufGmYtGbZVdGEiMqS3SNDw4VDXxCuBXPgmyHc6q4OhQsXHv61ytEzkjEx7BvclUkVdgEYIcyMc&c=dJ-xuYNVnHZ_15Vn_sxUeyMxgtbXDHNQBUVfRH4P_aIJUquqeHyXtQ==&ch=CL3qgASyVjK3hJHVe7Mgw2kW4I8wwPIYpJlP5poK94Q9cg-9RUaOLw==)
---
| Now is a time for kindness and empathy. As we reopen, we need think about our communities, families, and neighbors over ourselves. We can come out of our homes and get back to some limited activities - and for those of you who can, we want you to support local businesses, go to retail stores, pick up food from your favorite restaurant, go schedule a doctor's appointment you've been putting off. It will all feel a bit different, and we need everyone to continue taking precautions, but hopefully we can all start getting a bit closer to our old routines.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mwO3Rdv9tB4pHdn4HVsqTFeLXFOQyCVPiU3sE8jz8ECrotF2AGngiPikBLIZVrCiKIufUob4p__gHwB52iUDiDk0NNyU5jl55jW3gp4Qtot_59sDBCxPq6eY3h_FDGQUXSfTFPUqZfGtQELVV8q43kk3TF3Wpn5qiARNk6Cd_R-ERboPGUn46apbeW6-aEl5Tnbi5Yu8RsBIotOMjrwHUupU2YQ7p0kXcvEWfk7MphygjWRQ8c7luok5zFk6XWivhuUCHV8N2vTT85mSfdW-Bf12G1D5immk-iDhdKEq6jYL2Tzc29221U_Aq9poQiJLzyBLTEPQJU8=&c=dJ-xuYNVnHZ_15Vn_sxUeyMxgtbXDHNQBUVfRH4P_aIJUquqeHyXtQ==&ch=CL3qgASyVjK3hJHVe7Mgw2kW4I8wwPIYpJlP5poK94Q9cg-9RUaOLw==).
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---
| [Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=e1855c6c-5862-4a90-ae80-ad9073d44c49)
---
[Update Profile](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=oo&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=e1855c6c-5862-4a90-ae80-ad9073d44c49) | [About Constant Contact](http://www.constantcontact.com/legal/about-constant-contact)
Sent by [communications@governor.ri.gov](mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov) in collaboration with
| [ ](http://www.constantcontact.com/index.jsp?cc=nge&rmc=VF19_3GE)
---
[Try email marketing for free today!](http://www.constantcontact.com/index.jsp?cc=nge&rmc=VF19_3GE)

To participate in the County Convention Process and/or run for Delegate to the Democratic State Convention please follow the link above and submit your pre-filing form!

name: Dr. Manny Sethi
subject: Check-Up with Dr. Manny 5/11
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved
body:
[](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jklhluht-olhhkyhhid-y/)
---
| |
---|---|---
| Friends, As we are slowly reopening and resuming our daily lives, I hope you are continuing to remain safe as we can see the light at the end of the tunnel! I'm thrilled that we are closer to getting back out on the road in our big orange bus and meeting Tennesseans all across the state. I know many of you, like me, are anxious to resume your normal lives. I would continue to recommend exercising caution when in public and maintain social distancing protocols. As always, if you have any questions or I can help in any way, please feel free to email me directly at [manny@drmannyforsenate.com](http://manny@drmannyforsenate.com), or give me a call at (615) 200-7195. **News: ** This week, I joined Fox News again to discuss how we can reopen our economy, and also how we can safely contain the coronavirus. I believe a vertical containment strategy is the most surgical and effective way to do this. Vertical containment strategies will help us quarantine folks who are most at risk, while allowing everyone else to resume our normal lives and get our country back to work. [Watch my interview with Fox News here!](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jklhluht-olhhkyhhid-j/) [](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jklhluht-olhhkyhhid-t/) **Social Media:** [](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jklhluht-olhhkyhhid-i/) Last Saturday morning, I was joined by my lovely wife Maya for another virtual town hall. It was great answering so many of your questions and talking about ways we are entertaining our kids during quarantine! [You can watch the full town hall here. ](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jklhluht-olhhkyhhid-d/) Follow us on [Facebook](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jklhluht-olhhkyhhid-h/), [Twitter](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jklhluht-olhhkyhhid-k/), and [Instagram](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jklhluht-olhhkyhhid-u/) to keep up with all that we are doing during this pandemic. We aren't slowing this campaign down as we work towards victory in August! **COVID-19 Resources:** There are many resources at your disposal. I urge you to order take-out, donate blood, wear a mask even if you are feeling fine, and above all, pray for our country during this time. Also please continue to adhere to the guidelines being put forth by [President Trump](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jklhluht-olhhkyhhid-o/), [Governor Lee](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jklhluht-olhhkyhhid-b/), and [the CDC](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jklhluht-olhhkyhhid-n/), even as the economy gets up and running again. I can't wait to get back out to every corner of Tennessee in our big orange bus and continue meeting you all. I believe Tennesseans should meet their next US Senator. Stay safe out there. I'm praying for all of you! Dr. Manny P.S. There are less than 90 days until Election Day! A donation right now will help me reach the US Senate and be a true representative of YOU, instead of a Washington insider. [DoNATe herE](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jklhluht-olhhkyhhid-p/) Copyright © 2019 Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved.
Our mailing address is:
PO Box 58068, Nashville, TN 37205 |

body:

[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/11b29168bcebdaec/6195307d29908c58c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, Do you want a chance to talk to Corky and find out more about how he’s going to win the Republican primary then defeat Jeanne Shaheen? **We are holding a tele-town hall today, and Corky wants you to be there**. With the current pandemic, we've changed to tele-town hall events. It’s important for Corky to keep you up-to-date on all the latest developments in this race, and give you the opportunity to ask him any questions you may have. **Today at 1 P.M., we’re hosting a LIVE “Granite State Conversations” tele-town hall meeting, with a particular focus on Cheshire County!**

It's easy to join in. Just take these two simple steps:
1. [**Tap or click here to RSVP**.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/11b29168bcebdaec/ceca106c6bdb7e3cc3d6b838967d376c/33153)
2. Call in at 1 P.M. to join. The phone number is (603) 506-4097.

Corky will be talking about the upcoming race to flip this seat RED by defeating career politician Jeanne Shaheen, and how we’ve shifted our campaign strategy to win while dealing with the COVID-19 crisis. **Don’t forget that this in an interactive event, so please bring your questions for Corky!** We’ll see you there - **[Follow this link to RSVP now!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/11b29168bcebdaec/5b88558dbd186ec9c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** -Team Messner | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/11b29168bcebdaec/78da2eba78043df0c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/11b29168bcebdaec/c15e44d503474778c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

We are holding a tele-town hall today, and Corky wants you to be there. With the current pandemic, we've changed to tele-town hall events. It’s important for Corky to keep you up-to-date on all the latest developments in this race, and give you the opportunity to ask him any questions you may have. Today at 1 P.M., we’re hosting a LIVE “Granite State Conversations” tele-town hall meeting, with a particular focus on Cheshire County! It's easy to join in. Just take these two simple steps: 1. 2. Call in at 1 P.M. to join. The phone number is (603) 506-4097. Corky will be talking about the upcoming race to flip this seat RED by defeating career politician Jeanne Shaheen, and how we’ve shifted our campaign strategy to win while dealing with the COVID-19 crisis. **Georgia is one of only four states in America not to have any hate crime laws.**

After the February lynching of Ahmaud Arbery and the belated arrest of his killers last week, Georgia must pass hate crime legislation to honor the memory of Ahmaud and to ensure that justice is served in any future hate crimes.

**_[That is why I am asking you to join me by demanding in the strongest possible terms that the Georgia Legislature pass its existing hate crime legislation H.B. 426 for Governor Brian Kemp to sign into law.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17459222/195251905/-1524247199?contactdata=BVtgv%2FdMF8CyhNmGR%2BMNywreZxgMlgO4X1JgncFV31iMJy6cDuO34O5UPlOuZ0VS5Yi0wpQpGqvrvkGFjpiJmZrVwuYL7YPn2oBgG3NCLXzwekV0PKxg%2Fs2r3cN2Y2Mz%2FaFzhNllOWxsTfP7wYa5jV1psaSy8rJYkkoz5sQyAbU%3D&quick=true&ms=em051220-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzBkYzMzYy01Njk0LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xVgWimNWdMbAxnAgTJeMuINBeiDDNG27i4t7ODqB45A=&emci=33a8dd7c-4f94-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=c30dc33c-5694-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=463701)_**

Friend,

Ahmaud Arbery’s murder is part of a system of oppression that extends beyond Georgia. The public outrage it has triggered it is not confined to our state lines.

The injustice made known to the public last week has stoked a national outrage and a call to action — **as one of only four states without a hate crime law in place, Georgia must pass such legislation into law immediately as a justice tribute to Ahmaud Arbery and any future victims of such atrocities.**

[**Please join me in calling for the Georgia Legislature to pass hate crime legislation with H.B. 426 for Governor Brian Kemp to sign into law. Once you have added your name, you will have the opportunity to contribute to the Georgia NAACP which is fighting for justice on behalf of Ahmaud Arbery’s family.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17459224/195251907/-1524247199?contactdata=BVtgv%2FdMF8CyhNmGR%2BMNywreZxgMlgO4X1JgncFV31iMJy6cDuO34O5UPlOuZ0VS5Yi0wpQpGqvrvkGFjpiJmZrVwuYL7YPn2oBgG3NCLXzwekV0PKxg%2Fs2r3cN2Y2Mz%2FaFzhNllOWxsTfP7wYa5jV1psaSy8rJYkkoz5sQyAbU%3D&quick=true&ms=em051220-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzBkYzMzYy01Njk0LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xVgWimNWdMbAxnAgTJeMuINBeiDDNG27i4t7ODqB45A=&emci=33a8dd7c-4f94-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=c30dc33c-5694-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=463701)

The culture of vigilantism that contributed to Ahmaud Arbery’s murder — a culture made legal by so-called “stand your ground” laws and encouraged by too many conservative politicians and personalities, as well as gun lobbyists and manufacturers — must end.

Peter, As Congress plans the next stimulus bill, some members, including Michael McCaul, want to give a huge bailout for corporate lobbyists. **This would be a huge mistake.** What message does this send to the American people? Tens of millions for us are unemployed, wondering how we might pay rent or buy food or see a doctor. I can’t believe these “representatives” want to give billions to lobbyists — people whose job is to write political checks and gain influence for wealthy patrons. The Trump Administration has already exploited the COVID-19 pandemic to give trillions of dollars to big corporations—often with no strings attached—and many billions more in tax breaks for the wealthy. We need to draw a line in the sand — put the people first! **[I’ve spent my career in the classroom and the courtroom fighting for the people. Next year in Congress, I will do the same — working for real people, not corporate lobbyists! Help me get there by chipping in right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17459504/195255031/140021304?refcode=em051220&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzI4ZDVkOC01ODk0LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PmuKe8TmgbMCBVBX6vG_Q99QGWtQW15P_bVYD6dGSUI=)**

Hey Peter, The 2020 presidential election continues to draw closer and Joe Biden has emerged as the presumptive Democratic nominee. While this may signal good news for those who want a return to the Obama-Biden days, veterans are more skeptical.

Joe Biden’s name can be found on much of the legislation that has fueled today’s opioid crisis. And he wants to socialize healthcare, including that provided for veterans.

All of this paints a grim picture for Biden in terms of how he intends to treat our country’s valued veterans and active duty service members. [**Everything you need to know is in our latest article.**](https://hs-6023921.t.hubspotstarter-ir.net/e2t/c/*W5JVcXx1Ww15pW6P1RV95zX0YW0/*W1L9RYd1thYVCW4cCT_28JX2n_0/5/f18dQhb0Sq5J8XJ8QKN8ky44xHyjJqVSb6sz5v_-hnW3hHhbc5Cgxh0VnQ9Qq8-yrshW4chNdg8Xlfb2W54pDFQ54F_DtW8X0-rk30THXyW549CGt4dQ70VVH5dSS4h_b4QW31H6Qk52XMDmW57_wgp8V3nmlW85g4wv3-Qf1vW8Fj2Ws4kyrD4W38MST_7b9mLBW5m89pw6wLMZ1W7JtTqn8hTJV4W8lwVXY8hS296W7bj1-t2zfyqdW7NrMZs3ndfYDW5DFWr25mKjF6W3m2qxB53X_ZpN53hfLpQC5z2VPC2cV7fV3pNW26Fmws8sZWr-W6NQ-Rp1r-Yb4W3JfklC4wSddvW4WRNtT5y7jVJW60gWmY5yJZzWW97ZPZG5GNqD3W8rMhWM4VDv0-W6Mkg8q4YxlWWW2zNxvG5wnMstW8sd_7t4RtZjpW5rjkXW2Cy87KW4PkBg56BkmJ-W6t_Hvd8Ph58-W59BvpH2Hm5HMW4h8sbR7vc41hN8lwGHnj8tbNW480Y_K5CRyvGW6VjxFG3_QydHW85XMG189qkPQW2stHCn7_4v9GW5NNm_H5ZDFd9V5XK812_d9Lm102)

name: Bill Olson
subject: Iraq, Korea, West Germany, 9-11
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fvKOYVdmH_6OuRU&b=56jeIiPKpg2FOMHyP5wj6w

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet running to take back a Swing district

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fvKOYVdmH_6OuRU&b=56jeIiPKpg2FOMHyP5wj6w
- Florida’s 9th District, currently held by embattled liberal Democrat Darren Soto.

Career politicians like Soto have no real world experience. I have risked my life for our country. The story of my life - and my family’s lives- is one of sacrifice for our country, for our safety, for our freedom.

That very sacrifice - protecting my country and our freedoms - is the exact reason I will be a worthy and honorable member of Congress.

I have seen my share of intense situations that have tested my mettle.

I joined the U.S. Army in the early 1980s, training to be an airborne paratrooper. My early duty stations took me to exotic locations such as the Republic of South Korea (close to the DMZ) and to Cold War West Germany, when the Berlin Wall was still up and being guarded by East German machine guns.

Along the way, I served in Special Forces, Engineer, Aviation, Infantry, and JSOC (operations) units.

That prepared me for a great challenge filled with great danger - fighting in Desert Storm for the liberation of Kuwait.

I served in the 1st Infantry Division, fighting along the “Highway of Death”. It was our job to fight and kill Saddam Hussein’s Republican Guard.

I had the unhappy duty to police the battlefield to protect the fallen - graves registration. You never appreciate the horrors of war as you do with that somber task.

We road marched our vehicles all the way to Basra, and after the negotiated peace, it was our job to guard the burning oil fields. I witnessed the dark soot during the day, and the night alight in fire from burning oil. You could smell the death and the burnt oil mixed in the air.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fvKOYVdmH_6OuRU&b=56jeIiPKpg2FOMHyP5wj6w

We were all contaminated with residue, covered with burned petroleum.

However, we took hundreds of POW surrenders - all of them Saddam’s Republican Guard elite soldiers.

That was not the end of my service to the country in times of crisis however.

I happened to be stationed in New York City during 9-11.

If I thought that the burning oilfields of Iraq were a nightmare, being part of the on-the-ground response to these terrorist attacks, took it to a whole new level.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fvKOYVdmH_6OuRU&b=56jeIiPKpg2FOMHyP5wj6w

The cleanup and rescue missions in New York were massive, and operations began immediately. I was once again called on to work for our country.

I wound up being stationed in New York until 2006, in a large number of roles: providing on-the-ground support to FEMA, supporting firefighters in their mission, and assisting all the agencies to get supplies to Ground Zero, where there never seemed to be enough of certain things.

So far, I had an intense and eventful military career. I had risked my life for my country many times, working to defend our people and our way of life.

But I was not done quite yet.

Once more I got the call to deploy, this time to serve in Joint Special Operations Command in Afghanistan - supporting our soldiers in some pretty remote places.

Here, I got to provide logistics to some key operations.

I was able to support the “tip of the spear”, managing logistics for SEAL team 6, as well as all government agencies in country- NSA, FBI, CIA teams.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fvKOYVdmH_6OuRU&b=56jeIiPKpg2FOMHyP5wj6w

My expertise had me handling supplies, equipment, vehicles, and even support some missions I cannot mention on here.

This was no easy task. For my work I was awarded the Bronze Star, which is still one of my most honored possessions, and something I will always cherish.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fvKOYVdmH_6OuRU&b=56jeIiPKpg2FOMHyP5wj6w

After my service, I retired honorably from the military - just in time to see my three sons join the military. I had one son in the Navy, two in the Air Force. They served in Iraq, Japan, and Afghanistan- one on the same base (Bagram) that I had served years before! Pics of me and my boys below.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fvKOYVdmH_6OuRU&b=56jeIiPKpg2FOMHyP5wj6w

So when people ask me, “Bill, what do you bring for experience as you run for Congress?”, I can answer that I have been a part of every major national challenge over the last 30 years.... And I was the one making sure our heroes had what they needed to get the job done.

I have risked my life for our country and I would do it again. That is the depth of my patriotism, the depth of my commitment to the “Land of the Free.”

But now, I face a different challenge - and I need YOUR commitment to help me see it through!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fvKOYVdmH_6OuRU&b=56jeIiPKpg2FOMHyP5wj6w

I think those who have laid the most on the line for our country and its citizens - whose who have taken an Oath to defend the Constitution - are the ones best fit to defend our Constitution in Congress.

Me, I’m not a career politician. I don't have fancy refrigerators full of $15 designer ice cream like Nancy Pelosi. I don't have billions of dollars of George Soros or Michael Bloomberg hand outs.

I earned my education in the Cold War outposts of freeom in Germany and South Korea, as well as the battlefields of Kuwait, Iraq, and Afghanistan. And I hate to say it, I served on the battlefield of New York City after 9-11. That's why I'm 100% behind the President's "America First" policies and support the President 100% against all enemies foreign and domestic. And there are plenty of domestic enemies, believe me.

Let's be clear - there is NO Republican win in 2020 without Florida.

Florida is so pivotal. The electoral votes, along with so many Republican-leaning and swing congressional districts, make this state of paramount importance.

Plus, it's now President Trump's home state!

Perhaps you agree with me, that we need more Bible, more Constitution, more freedom, and more Trump - and less crazy liberal career politician Democrats like Darren Soto.

If so, then I need your help!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fvKOYVdmH_6OuRU&b=56jeIiPKpg2FOMHyP5wj6w

Darren Soto will have all of Nancy Pelosi's Swamp money. That's why I need your help

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fvKOYVdmH_6OuRU&b=56jeIiPKpg2FOMHyP5wj6w
today- to replace Darren Soto, and support the President! Here is Soto below chumming it up with Nancy Pelosi:

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fvKOYVdmH_6OuRU&b=56jeIiPKpg2FOMHyP5wj6w

The Dems and their media allies are putting out lies. We need to get the REAL truth out too - and for that, canyou help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fvKOYVdmH_6OuRU&b=56jeIiPKpg2FOMHyP5wj6w

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fvKOYVdmH_6OuRU&b=56jeIiPKpg2FOMHyP5wj6w
of $15, $35, $60, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple? I need to raise an additional $6,900 by the end of this month to pay for the needed advertising!

The Democrats are going to lose this year - with your help!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fvKOYVdmH_6OuRU&b=56jeIiPKpg2FOMHyP5wj6w

Let's get this done!

name: Stephen Stepanek
subject: NHGOP Operations Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee** 10 Water Street, Concord
body:
| |
---
Hello Derek,
I wanted to send you an update as to what the New Hampshire Republican Party is doing and how we are continuing our efforts to organize, recruit, and train Republicans across the State of New Hampshire to ensure a victorious November election is on the horizon.
Since I last wrote to you, the NHGOP & Trump Victory staff have still been hard at work fielding questions from activists, orchestrating our online NHGOP Convention, and holding virtual trainings. In the last month our team has contacted 75,000 voters by phone, held 60+ virtual events, and have trained over 350 volunteers.
To date, the NHGOP working alongside the Committee to Elect House Republicans (CTEHR) has recruited over 325 candidates to the New Hampshire House, and we're closing in on recruiting over 50 more before filing in June. The NHGOP, Trump Victory, and CTEHR have trained over 100 of those candidates for State House in the last few weeks, preparing our candidates for the fall elections with the latest tools and campaign strategy.
In short, the New Hampshire Republican Party is active and prepared during COVID-19 and we will continue continue to hold the Democrats accountable.
With this update today, I want to stress that we need your support in order to have the resources needed for victory. Our competition isn't slowing down and we aren't either which is why we need your help to have the resources to properly fight back.
[Donate $10 to help us reach out to 500 voters digitally](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDE5NTA4NTIzMTMzMzEwMjE0JmM9eTl5OCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNDcxMDExMjgmZD1qNnA4aTVq.RguCjGkpckiiEvrmE3PdfufgebgcMl2uZdefd-TPFvw)

[Donate $30 to do both!](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDE5NTA4NTIzMTMzMzEwMjE0JmM9eTl5OCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNDcxMDExMzImZD11NWkydzZt.l59hMdudwcSeqYWb8gZMwJqxbpNlil-T678rxlgYuDM)
The NHGOP is ready and prepared to elect Republicans across the State of New Hampshire during these times. [I hope you can support us in that effort.](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDE5NTA4NTIzMTMzMzEwMjE0JmM9eTl5OCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNDcxMDExMzQmZD1zMnk0YzFl.qLg7iBPN7HUeo8yAEu7BwauPa185cvSH7xvKpI3JyWs)

body:
Friend, When we sent those numbers to Senator Cornyn, he was absolutely shocked.
His Senate colleagues from key battleground states... all OUTRAISED by ultra-liberal challengers?
He couldn't believe it.
Friend, Senator Cornyn wants you to understand that losing the Senate would mean severe consequences for our entire country.
Higher taxes, LIBERAL Supreme Court Justices, and more we simply can't afford to lose the Senate.
Now, with more and more GOP Senators falling behind in their fundraising, we're starting the #MajorityWatchFund, to help educate voters in what losing the Senate would mean for us.

name: Jerid
subject: 47 more signatures needed from Alpharetta
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Reverend Warnock's request for you:
Friend: Did you see Reverend Warnock's note?
---
The U.S. Postal Service could run out of money in just _months_ , and the current administration is refusing emergency aid to save it.
Reverend Warnock is fighting to demand Congress take action before it's too late, but he can't do it alone. He needs another 47 Democrats from Alpharetta to join him by midnight tonight - and we're still missing your name.
**[Please, click here now to sign our petition demanding Congress take action to save the Postal Service.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://petitions.signforgood.com/SavetheUSPostalService/?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=Warnock&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwarnock-priorities-refresh%3Fcode%3Djtk228-ja-nd")**
Thanks,
Jerid
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Reverend Warnock
Date: Fri, May 8, 2020
Subject: re: saving the U.S. Postal Service
| | |
---
Friend,

**The U.S. Postal Service is in _serious_ ****danger:** Postal workers are getting sick, mail volume is dropping - and without emergency funding, this vital institution could be insolvent by September.
**We can 't let this happen, friend.** An insolvent Postal Service would mean 600,000 hardworking people could lose their jobs. It would make it harder for communities across our country - especially those in rural areas - to access lifesaving medications, wages and Social Security benefits. And with millions of voters planning to cast their ballots by mail this November, it could put our constitutional right to vote at risk.
I'm raising my voice to support this essential service, but congressional action is the _only_ thing that can save the USPS from catastrophe - and I need your help to demand it. **[_Please, friend, will you click here to add your name to our petition demanding Congress take action now to save the Postal Service? Since this is so urgent, I 'm looking to get 2,000 signatures by midnight tonight._](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://petitions.signforgood.com/SavetheUSPostalService/?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=Warnock&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwarnock-priorities-refresh%3Fcode%3Djtk228-ja-nd")**
| | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://petitions.signforgood.com/SavetheUSPostalService/?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=Warnock&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwarnock-priorities-refresh%3Fcode%3Djtk228-ja-nd")
---
Thanks so much for raising your voice with me on this critical issue.

Reverend Warnock
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e7d1/288179be/ba3abde/348e9e19/1275912296/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") | | (C) 2020 | Paid for by Warnock for Georgia.
Title and affiliation are provided for identification purposes only.
PO Box 991 Decatur, GA 30031

name: Mark Warner
subject: Sign up for “virtual” phone bank!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Chuck for Congress, Inc
body:
We have 21 days to go – help us get out Dr. Chuck’s message! Read more >>
[ ](mailto:mark@drchuckforcongress.com) Fellow Hoosier, It’s an election year unlike any other... and we’re adapting to rise to the challenge before us. We have just 21 days until the June 2nd primary. But we cannot wait to “get out the vote”... All Indiana voters are eligible to vote by mail in this election. _This means more voters will be casting their ballots BEFORE Election Day._ That’s why I’m writing, Fellow Hoosier. We’re looking for volunteers to join our “virtual” phone bank.

**Sign up today to make calls from the comfort of your home, to introduce Republican voters to Dr. Chuck and let them know why he’s the BEST choice for the 5th District!** If you’d like to join our volunteer team, please email me at [mark@drchuckforcongress.com](mailto:mark@drchuckforcongress.com). As you know, Dr. Chuck is not a politician. He’s a man who’s spent his life helping people hurting and in need... and he’s eager to SERVE our families and communities in Congress. Now more than ever before as we see healthcare and politics intersect we need a Doctor in the House! Dr. Chuck is a businessman who will work to get our economy back on track. He’s a committed warrior for the most vulnerable, earning him an endorsement from Indiana Right to Life. And he’s determined to upend the broken status quo in Washington, by pushing for term limits to end the era of “career” politicians. Please join this critical effort to help us reach Republican voters and win their support for Dr. Chuck. Shoot me an email today! Mark Warner
[mark@drchuckforcongress.com](mailto:mark@drchuckforcongress.com) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/9918359d9780f48e/7a94868684ec3602c3d6b838967d376c/33363) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/9918359d9780f48e/ca30c33be6a0c27bc3d6b838967d376c/33363)

name: Team Fitzpatrick
subject: June 2nd Election Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress
body:
With the June 2nd Election Date just weeks away, Team Fitzpatrick will be reconstituting limited and safety-conscious campaign activity in preparation Friend, With the June 2nd Election Date just weeks away, Team Fitzpatrick will be reconstituting limited and safety-conscious campaign activity in preparation for Election Day while still maintaining our charitable operations. If there are any Election Day materials you need from us, please let us know and our Team will safely deliver them to you.
As our charitable operations are continuing going forward, please join us in continuing to support these amazing organizations, both financially and through volunteering, so that we can continue to help those who help others in need. We will be maintaining our normal schedule of charitable assistance and will continue to keep you apprised of dates and locations where you can join us!

Team Fitzpatrick

Paid for by Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress

Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress
PO Box 939
Langhorne, PA 19047

clean_body: With the June 2nd Election Date just weeks away, Team Fitzpatrick will be reconstituting limited and safety-conscious campaign activity in preparation Friend, With the June 2nd Election Date just weeks away, Team Fitzpatrick will be reconstituting limited and safety-conscious campaign activity in preparation for Election Day while still maintaining our charitable operations. If there are any Election Day materials you need from us, please let us know and our Team will safely deliver them to you. As our charitable operations are continuing going forward, please join us in continuing to support these amazing organizations, both financially and through volunteering, so that we can continue to help those who help others in need. We will be maintaining our normal schedule of charitable assistance and will continue to keep you apprised of dates and locations where you can join us! Team Fitzpatrick Paid for by Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress PO Box 939 Langhorne, PA 19047 This email is sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress. We're fighting to give conservative Californians a voice -- restoring common-sense leadership to Congress.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001z9pUB5oxubRnvhAJ7JvYxmUSlf14i3lCjek74uYDkL8qhwsqrQO3p6I5djuMSTMGpq6i86ot9jaVXYMSUqg17ytWBLe9J0mNYkFwBcUMSWFEiVN_UxtvdZ-dp-_mD3Ro_EirwSmqG-bbBo8GViKffSltDeNgcV5N-_495Qo1ZsIq2pV6TVC_pJ2jbXGW25HqLWX6pqh8O8GRzlBZuiGpWStDvQzF5Co4hZwT5_S2F8dmT75FqauL78q8cD97EJCEJeSPfv11YsmmI4H3OSnYNgj2m1x1hTu2k_kcQswNUJZRJgGFE3hIEgRt96HSb9HKJttqpjhJrGCtJZnonf7ubA0Xz0Zp4ukmbzOfRvz4iSQLsI47Cm05Rolw6iM4uYc-&c=CfjESp_y7CrNanuxKfVaX3l5FLqaoYACFtd0uZZA2pGjTz_GzM0d5w==&ch=0_kwN_U9HLTFTtsdyJ_T-qtjqgwB-VfVjwJhI86GMCXl-NGvR2UiGg==)

Just over a year ago, we set out to flip this seat RED -- a seat only recently turned blue by Nancy Pelosi and our self-funded liberal opponent.

Since then, we've accomplished so much. We won our primary, we were named one of the top 7 races in the country, and most importantly we built an incredible grassroots team... _but we 're missing one thing: YOU._

[**Can you to chip in to our November Victory Fund, Friend?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001z9pUB5oxubRnvhAJ7JvYxmUSlf14i3lCjek74uYDkL8qhwsqrQO3p6I5djuMSTMGpq6i86ot9jaVXYMSUqg17ytWBLe9J0mNYkFwBcUMSWFEiVN_UxtvdZ-dp-_mD3Ro_EirwSmqG-bbBo8GViKffSltDeNgcV5N-_495Qo1ZsIq2pV6TVC_pJ2jbXGW25HqLWX6pqh8O8GRzlBZuiGpWStDvQzF5Co4hZwT5_S2F8dmT75FqauL78q8cD97EJCEJeSPfv11YsmmI4H3OSnYNgj2m1x1hTu2k_kcQswNUJZRJgGFE3hIEgRt96HSb9HKJttqpjhJrGCtJZnonf7ubA0Xz0Zp4ukmbzOfRvz4iSQLsI47Cm05Rolw6iM4uYc-&c=CfjESp_y7CrNanuxKfVaX3l5FLqaoYACFtd0uZZA2pGjTz_GzM0d5w==&ch=0_kwN_U9HLTFTtsdyJ_T-qtjqgwB-VfVjwJhI86GMCXl-NGvR2UiGg==) We're facing one of the toughest races in the nation and by all measures it's a toss-up. With just 180 days until Election Day, we're going to need all the help we can get.

I knew getting back into this fight wouldn't be easy, but it's important:

**We 're fighting to give Californians a voice** \-- restoring common-sense leadership to Congress.
**We 're fighting to take back the House** \-- putting an end to the Left's socialist agenda.

The Democrats spent $10,000,000.00 against me in 2018 to keep a conservative voice out of Congress, and they're organizing to do it again. We can't let Nancy Pelosi buy this seat outright -- [**can I count on your support?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001z9pUB5oxubRnvhAJ7JvYxmUSlf14i3lCjek74uYDkL8qhwsqrQO3p6I5djuMSTMGpq6i86ot9jaVXYMSUqg17ytWBLe9J0mNYkFwBcUMSWFEiVN_UxtvdZ-dp-_mD3Ro_EirwSmqG-bbBo8GViKffSltDeNgcV5N-_495Qo1ZsIq2pV6TVC_pJ2jbXGW25HqLWX6pqh8O8GRzlBZuiGpWStDvQzF5Co4hZwT5_S2F8dmT75FqauL78q8cD97EJCEJeSPfv11YsmmI4H3OSnYNgj2m1x1hTu2k_kcQswNUJZRJgGFE3hIEgRt96HSb9HKJttqpjhJrGCtJZnonf7ubA0Xz0Zp4ukmbzOfRvz4iSQLsI47Cm05Rolw6iM4uYc-&c=CfjESp_y7CrNanuxKfVaX3l5FLqaoYACFtd0uZZA2pGjTz_GzM0d5w==&ch=0_kwN_U9HLTFTtsdyJ_T-qtjqgwB-VfVjwJhI86GMCXl-NGvR2UiGg==)

name: Tina Smith
subject: Then and now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Friend — When we first began this journey together, no one could have predicted we would end up running a campaign quite like this — entirely online, without any in-person events, relying on folks like you chipping in to emails just like this one. I’ll be candid with you: I miss being out on the campaign trail and meeting folks from every corner of our great state. Hopping on video calls or chatting over the phone isn’t the same as having a face-to-face conversation, but the way our online community has stepped up since all of this began has been nothing short of incredible. Even though we had to move our campaign operations online and change so many parts of our strategy to win this race, one thing remains the same: **Mitch McConnell’s network of super PACs and billionaires is spending big to protect his Senate majority.** McConnell’s right-wing megadonors have already booked millions in ads targeting Democrats in key Senate races across the country. And you can bet there’s a lot more where that came from. **So, with our original strategy transformed, the success of our campaign will require a groundswell of online contributions to respond to Mitch McConnell’s shady donor network and flip the Senate. name: Adem Bunkeddeko
subject: Sign Here: We need Medicare for All
body:
Peter,

COVID-19 is decimating black neighborhoods. We see it in the data, and we see it firsthand in our communities every day -- but we may never fully grasp the magnitude of this pandemic until we begin to understand how it’s affecting not only our health, but our healthcare.

Take, for example, the maternal health wards in predominantly black communities that are now overrun with COVID patients, or the rural hospitals in predominantly black counties that, due to a lack of revenue from elective procedures, may be forced to shutter for good. Black Americans already have limited access to high-quality care -- for many, this crisis could potentially eliminate all access to care, period.

If we want to make truly affordable, accessible, and high-quality care available to every American, then we need to pass Medicare for All. If you agree, will you join me by signing this petition today? https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/sign-if-you-agree-we-need-congress-to-pass-medicare-for-all-now-more-than-ever?source=20200326_MedicareForAll_AB&referrer=group-adem-bunkeddeko-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fabm4a

SIGN HERE: WE NEED MEDICARE FOR ALL https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/sign-if-you-agree-we-need-congress-to-pass-medicare-for-all-now-more-than-ever?source=20200326_MedicareForAll_AB&referrer=group-adem-bunkeddeko-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fabm4a

Racial disparities in our healthcare system existed long before this pandemic, and black Americans will continue to be at risk long after unless we take action now. clean_body: Peter, COVID-19 is decimating black neighborhoods. We see it in the data, and we see it firsthand in our communities every day -- but we may never fully grasp the magnitude of this pandemic until we begin to understand how it’s affecting not only our health, but our healthcare. Take, for example, the maternal health wards in predominantly black communities that are now overrun with COVID patients, or the rural hospitals in predominantly black counties that, due to a lack of revenue from elective procedures, may be forced to shutter for good. Black Americans already have limited access to high-quality care -- for many, this crisis could potentially eliminate all access to care, period. If we want to make truly affordable, accessible, and high-quality care available to every American, then we need to pass Medicare for All. If you agree, will you join me by signing this petition today? SIGN HERE: WE NEED MEDICARE FOR ALL Racial disparities in our healthcare system existed long before this pandemic, and black Americans will continue to be at risk long after unless we take action now. So add your name today, and help me fight for the care that can save our communities. Best, Adem ADD YOUR NAME | Copyright © 2020 Friends of Adem, All rights reserved. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Trump's Critics in Coronavirus Crisis Want to Have it Both Ways. They Can't
body:
"Before the outbreak, numerous Democrats were downplaying the virus and condemning Trump as a racist for his China and Europe travel bans." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0571ba864f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Trump's Critics in Coronavirus Crisis Want to Have it Both Ways. They Can't**

“Since this calamity began, many national Democratic leaders, the left-wing media and various never-Trumpers have been more interested in smearing President Donald Trump—no change there—than helping to solve the myriad problems caused by the coronavirus,” David Limbaugh writes for Fox News.

“Before the outbreak, numerous Democrats were downplaying the virus and condemning Trump as a racist for his China and Europe travel bans. Later they blamed Trump for not taking the virus seriously, when in fact, they were taking it less seriously than he was.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cc751cab9c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “RussiaGate is now a complete dead letter—but ObamaGate is taking its place. Just how far did the then-president go to cripple his successor? It’s now clear the Obama-Comey FBI and Justice Department never had anything more substantial than the laughable fiction of the Steele dossier to justify the ‘counterintelligence’ investigation of the Trump campaign,” the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=576f906f08&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| “The new jobs report released Friday proves what President Trump has been saying all along—it’s irresponsible to downplay the suffering of American workers caused by the devastating economic impact of the coronavirus pandemic. While we must do so as safely as possible, it’s time to get America back to work,” Andy Puzder writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7c694f739b&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “First Lady Melania Trump spoke to a Fenton first-grade class using a Zoom computer call to mark the two-year anniversary of her ‘Be Best’ initiative . . . When the 23 students logged onto the Zoom call on May 7, Melania Trump showed them a portrait of George Washington in the East Room of the White House,” Winter Keefer reports for [MLive.com](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dd8b1c0f98&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b9e16741b4&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7a50c1ebe6&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=02ee1f4814)
---

---

name: Hillary Holley
subject: INVITE: Weekend of Action with Fair Fight Action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa402/34a064cc/1bba290c/702a39a/3215540558/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Friend - With the June 9 primary quickly approaching, it is crucial we reach out to as many Georgians as possible about voting and returning their absentee ballots. **Join us for a weekend of action to text hundreds of thousands of voters across Georgia about requesting absentee ballots, returning their ballots, and voting by mail! With your help we can provide voters with the necessary resources to cast their ballot. ** **Vote-By-Mail Weekend of Action** **May 16 and 17** **Virtual text bank** [**SIGN UP HERE**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa402/34a064cc/1bba290c/702a39b/3215540558/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfBC3Q_i5dZhdGrdDEYLtXZ4xUiTtbwn6JoeZJlKV4Wy5kTlw/viewform?usp=sf_link") Directly contacting voters is a crucial way to ensure they have the information needed for this election. With the June 9 primary being conducted mostly by mail, it is more important than ever that voters have the knowledge and information required to cast their vote by mail and stay safe during the COVID-19 pandemic. [You can volunteer from anywhere - all you'll need is a laptop or tablet, and you can send texts to help us get the word out. ](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa402/34a064cc/1bba290c/702a39b/3215540558/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfBC3Q_i5dZhdGrdDEYLtXZ4xUiTtbwn6JoeZJlKV4Wy5kTlw/viewform?usp=sf_link") Additionally, our thoughts are with the family of Ahmaud Arbery during this difficult time. That's why Fair Fight has started a fundraiser for the Georgia NAACP, the lead local group organizing and supporting the fight to bring justice for Ahmaud Arbery. 100% of funds raised through this page will go towards GA NAACP. Please donate [here](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa402/34a064cc/1bba290c/702a398/3215540558/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgia_naacp"). Thank you all for your support and being in this fight. Thank you, Hillary |
---|---|---

body:
If Schumer's hand-picked candidate wins here, then Democrats are closer than ever before to take the Senate away from Republicans. I won't stand by and let the radical Left ruin the progress that we've made over the past six years and neither should you.

Friend, I know you didn't receive this message in your inbox from Mayor Pete Buttigieg, so I've forwarded it to you below.

Now we have yet another failed presidential candidate pleading with the far-Left base, and this time it's on behalf of John Hickenlooper. And to tell you the truth, it's worked.

The radical Left has kicked their fundraising campaigns into high gear over the past few months here in Colorado, and they aren't showing signs of slowing down anytime soon.

So here's the situation: if Schumer's hand-picked candidate wins here, then Democrats are closer than ever before to take the Senate away from Republicans. I won't stand by and let the radical Left ruin the progress that we've made over the past six years, Friend, and neither should you.

From: Pete Buttigieg

Subject: Common sense

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fbyUASZ6szn0BAQMR8EhqHHE8gfvtLif1lli2_FpwN_x3HZyP67tZptGP8isVHe1Pxny49BPkhJ7EtrOyR77ECLxglT-Be9kCEp7ZARQGNeTGRk32cMeXKSsCns0BSqtTd2j8bpo54LZaIFmCTgDN0W5hzIyDMO_lcY_kjXJJ_D_AHm4WBbcdVS-I9kDXsCxAhTd783509AaM-jkoJ45OHEs-KxzFQ8DP9OQv98EKJDA1YCgrhP6K_4VhP0GTu8VR1ppktd5T01vKqY9w46xNnA_7hkh3_mNhJtpXvmm8ghl6X3ZKkz6NUgB8FRrRjlMNEtFOM8nOUpOMejUhfwSBbdr1VeCh2VWqCQ30oAQe8pmvz6yo5ILFQfRq8g07DTFFnG28T2T908gy4akriBnAabCLvJgJRVfrutETqZx4_k=&c=Bod1nuou5YopLzihAEoN4oWvWuqKBDlYZJ4USaCL1vqGuFMj3DugvQ==&ch=OfqwlSIbY2fFfgXQg0UGCDZuNmy-slT4ZlQg27G7SxXLRS6Qf3xCSA==)
Hello,

For too long, the workings of our government have been captured, with corporate interests and the power politics of the wealthy dominating over the everyday needs of American families. In November, we have an exceptional opportunity to deliver better leadership to Washington.

You see, Democrats only need to flip four seats to take back the Senate majority this year. And nowhere is that more likely than John Hickenlooper's race in Colorado.

I'm doing whatever I can to elect a Democratic Senate. That starts right here. Will you join me in adding a donation to John's campaign before his end-of-month deadline in a few days? We can't take back the Senate without your support.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fbyUASZ6szn0BAQMR8EhqHHE8gfvtLif1lli2_FpwN_x3HZyP67tZptGP8isVHe1Pxny49BPkhJ7EtrOyR77ECLxglT-Be9kCEp7ZARQGNeTGRk32cMeXKSsCns0BSqtTd2j8bpo54LZaIFmCTgDN0W5hzIyDMO_lcY_kjXJJ_D_AHm4WBbcdVS-I9kDXsCxAhTd783509AaM-jkoJ45OHEs-KxzFQ8DP9OQv98EKJDA1YCgrhP6K_4VhP0GTu8VR1ppktd5T01vKqY9w46xNnA_7hkh3_mNhJtpXvmm8ghl6X3ZKkz6NUgB8FRrRjlMNEtFOM8nOUpOMejUhfwSBbdr1VeCh2VWqCQ30oAQe8pmvz6yo5ILFQfRq8g07DTFFnG28T2T908gy4akriBnAabCLvJgJRVfrutETqZx4_k=&c=Bod1nuou5YopLzihAEoN4oWvWuqKBDlYZJ4USaCL1vqGuFMj3DugvQ==&ch=OfqwlSIbY2fFfgXQg0UGCDZuNmy-slT4ZlQg27G7SxXLRS6Qf3xCSA==)

Just as our country needs it most, John would bring common sense to Washington. He's willing to roll up his sleeves, reach across the aisle, and get to work for everyday families. He's even refusing to accept a single donation from corporate PACs because he wants to run this campaign the right way.

As governor, John led the fight to protect our public lands and combat climate change. He signed critical gun safety measures into law. And he expanded vote by mail statewide in Colorado.

Now more than ever, we need a leader like John in the Senate to fight for everyday families instead of the special interests corrupting our politics.

But that doesn't mean Mitch McConnell and his special interest backers will go down without a fight. They've already announced $67 million worth of attack ads targeting Democrats like John. We'll need strong grassroots support to fight off that kind of money. So, I'm asking:

If you can, will you add a donation now to help John build the campaign he needs to flip this seat and bring Democrats one step closer to taking back the majority?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fbyUASZ6szn0BAQMR8EhqHHE8gfvtLif1lli2_FpwN_x3HZyP67tZptGP8isVHe1Pxny49BPkhJ7EtrOyR77ECLxglT-Be9kCEp7ZARQGNeTGRk32cMeXKSsCns0BSqtTd2j8bpo54LZaIFmCTgDN0W5hzIyDMO_lcY_kjXJJ_D_AHm4WBbcdVS-I9kDXsCxAhTd783509AaM-jkoJ45OHEs-KxzFQ8DP9OQv98EKJDA1YCgrhP6K_4VhP0GTu8VR1ppktd5T01vKqY9w46xNnA_7hkh3_mNhJtpXvmm8ghl6X3ZKkz6NUgB8FRrRjlMNEtFOM8nOUpOMejUhfwSBbdr1VeCh2VWqCQ30oAQe8pmvz6yo5ILFQfRq8g07DTFFnG28T2T908gy4akriBnAabCLvJgJRVfrutETqZx4_k=&c=Bod1nuou5YopLzihAEoN4oWvWuqKBDlYZJ4USaCL1vqGuFMj3DugvQ==&ch=OfqwlSIbY2fFfgXQg0UGCDZuNmy-slT4ZlQg27G7SxXLRS6Qf3xCSA==)
John has always fought to do right by the people of Colorado. That's how I know he'll make a great Senator, not just for Colorado, but for the entire country.

Thank you,

Pete Buttigieg
**

name: Nikki Haley
subject: New Petition to Congress: Stop Communist China
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand For America
body:
We're launching a petition to tell Congress that it's time to investigate China for its role in the COVID-19 crisis, halt the spread of Communist China's influence, and to bring manufacturing of critical medicine and supplies back to the USA.
Friend,

We're launching a petition to tell Congress that it's time to investigate China for its role in the COVID-19 crisis, halt the spread of Communist China's influence, and to bring manufacturing of critical medicine and supplies back to the USA.

**You can add your name at** [www.StopCommunistChina.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vu9E0T47bP8yA_rohxtmKOD6uO5As8pKhp255Q5FffWZvjflXHTl2YpDDCDHrhHshHh4_nHFjYP19kJUB9Xjy9ZBvWFStKonA-amFFwfx8mmtB25OO79E0U4d-hS6s8_EGj8X3v03BgxjMYfa2yWXM4T72mEeH5v4dfFeInoO2vFU4Dc-HvSmS7UbZMs8aqMuYfR4SnXpNKd1-PS_D-Dl7wGqXt_tTWv5DGb1HoIR2x94glFma20aYYdMGn6trLT28n3_C8Zirq2hpGT-N81jRIHfiITBqg4vQLkbZ4C8AaPEJdHG-sFft_XF_Tmbpfe&c=jBtzDDpLnBGeRpdiOwMmHMpoWlWt3ElxxSYtr0SkPX2yLskJy4HFnA==&ch=7DPWjAP13HuKsJrrLbcQnA8cWNqEVJL6yTWVyKGvG7qZ5pfTb0npvg==).

Because we know our Stand For America team will be critical in this fight, we're sending it to you first. **We need your help to make sure this is a success, please sign here:** [www.StopCommunistChina.com ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vu9E0T47bP8yA_rohxtmKOD6uO5As8pKhp255Q5FffWZvjflXHTl2YpDDCDHrhHshHh4_nHFjYP19kJUB9Xjy9ZBvWFStKonA-amFFwfx8mmtB25OO79E0U4d-hS6s8_EGj8X3v03BgxjMYfa2yWXM4T72mEeH5v4dfFeInoO2vFU4Dc-HvSmS7UbZMs8aqMuYfR4SnXpNKd1-PS_D-Dl7wGqXt_tTWv5DGb1HoIR2zi6H2YRLHvjpggrAa-uiQY4f773nrmYRL9_3eJq4FA3ZtVWO5guDKhOa_CFdG4GZXXf0STTnwXq_6S1trvz7S3&c=jBtzDDpLnBGeRpdiOwMmHMpoWlWt3ElxxSYtr0SkPX2yLskJy4HFnA==&ch=7DPWjAP13HuKsJrrLbcQnA8cWNqEVJL6yTWVyKGvG7qZ5pfTb0npvg==)
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vu9E0T47bP8yA_rohxtmKOD6uO5As8pKhp255Q5FffWZvjflXHTl2YpDDCDHrhHshHh4_nHFjYP19kJUB9Xjy9ZBvWFStKonA-amFFwfx8mmtB25OO79E0U4d-hS6s8_EGj8X3v03BgxjMYfa2yWXM4T72mEeH5v4dfFeInoO2vFU4Dc-HvSmS7UbZMs8aqMuYfR4SnXpNKd1-PS_D-Dl7wGqXt_tTWv5DGb1HoIR2x94glFma20aYYdMGn6trLT28n3_C8Zirq2hpGT-N81jRIHfiITBqg4vQLkbZ4C8AaPEJdHG-sFft_XF_Tmbpfe&c=jBtzDDpLnBGeRpdiOwMmHMpoWlWt3ElxxSYtr0SkPX2yLskJy4HFnA==&ch=7DPWjAP13HuKsJrrLbcQnA8cWNqEVJL6yTWVyKGvG7qZ5pfTb0npvg==)

Congress needs to act now, that's why we're delivering members this important message today. Tell them it's time to:
* Investigate the Communist Chinese government's role in covering up the initial COVID-19 outbreak.
* End China's stranglehold on critically-important supplies. Bring manufacturing of medical equipment and pharmaceuticals back to America.
* Make China pay the UN and other international organizations' like the second largest economy in the world should -- no more being treated like a poor "developing country."
* Support Taiwan. Push back against Communist China's bullying and allow Taiwan to join the World Health Organization (WHO).
* Require American colleges and universities to disclose all Chinese Communist government funding of professors and researchers.

We've set big goals for this petition, but we can reach them if we work together. [**Click here to add your name**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vu9E0T47bP8yA_rohxtmKOD6uO5As8pKhp255Q5FffWZvjflXHTl2YpDDCDHrhHshHh4_nHFjYP19kJUB9Xjy9ZBvWFStKonA-amFFwfx8mmtB25OO79E0U4d-hS6s8_EGj8X3v03BgxjMYfa2yWXM4T72mEeH5v4dfFeInoO2vFU4Dc-HvSmS7UbZMs8aqMuYfR4SnXpNKd1-PS_D-Dl7wGqXt_tTWv5DGb1HoIR2x94glFma20aYYdMGn6trLT28n3_C8Zirq2hpGT-N81jRIHfiITBqg4vQLkbZ4C8AaPEJdHG-sFft_XF_Tmbpfe&c=jBtzDDpLnBGeRpdiOwMmHMpoWlWt3ElxxSYtr0SkPX2yLskJy4HFnA==&ch=7DPWjAP13HuKsJrrLbcQnA8cWNqEVJL6yTWVyKGvG7qZ5pfTb0npvg==) and stand with us.

My very best,

[Privacy Policy](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vu9E0T47bP8yA_rohxtmKOD6uO5As8pKhp255Q5FffWZvjflXHTl2YpDDCDHrhHsHYQ8HLm-d2ihP7lU2xqotJxhk8zz4QdiuJ9BSzjSoWeHEj83vCjgNxw8T5zAvjJe_o6JNO8KSLxuShNE0GobkFMwmWtqin_zgpWCMGiRQ-lB08arRKd2mQ==&c=jBtzDDpLnBGeRpdiOwMmHMpoWlWt3ElxxSYtr0SkPX2yLskJy4HFnA==&ch=7DPWjAP13HuKsJrrLbcQnA8cWNqEVJL6yTWVyKGvG7qZ5pfTb0npvg==)
Paid for by Stand For America

body:
---
| | [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04a0/72412298/4f2db49b/6104ab85/581037615/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200512_Fauci_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200512_Fauci_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200512_Fauci_U1_X1")

**[Add your name to stand with Anthony Fauci today! ->](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04a0/72412298/4f2db49b/6104ab84/581037615/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "http://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200512_Fauci_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+to+stand+with+Anthony+Fauc&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200512_Fauci_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200512_Fauci_U1_X1")**
* * *
_The day has FINALLY arrived, Peter!!_ **Anthony Fauci is testifying in the Senate (remotely!) to discuss Donald Trump 's coronavirus response.** For the last several weeks, Americans have been PRAISING Fauci's truth-telling about COVID-19, and we are THRILLED he's finally getting the chance to testify in Congress. This is a HISTORIC day during this pandemic, and we're launching a rapid response petition: **[We need 2,500 signatures from strong Democrats like you to add their name to STAND WITH FAUCI as he testifies today -- will you add your name?](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04a0/72412298/4f2db49b/6104ab87/581037615/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "http://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200512_Fauci_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+We+need+2500+signatures+from+strong+Demo&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200512_Fauci_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200512_Fauci_U1_X1")** | | | [Add your name ->](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04a0/72412298/4f2db49b/6104ab86/581037615/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200512_Fauci_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+Add+your+name+rarr&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200512_Fauci_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200512_Fauci_U1_X1")
---
Today's testimony is even more important because Donald Trump REFUSES to allow Anthony Fauci to testify in the House:
[](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04a0/72412298/4f2db49b/6104ab89/581037615/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200512_Fauci_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200512_Fauci_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200512_Fauci_U1_X1")
**This means that Fauci 's testimony before the Senate today could be his ONLY chance to finally speak the TRUTH about Trump's coronavirus debacle.**
**So we need as many Good Democrats cheering on Fauci as possible.[Add your name right away if you support Anthony Fauci as he testifies today!](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04a0/72412298/4f2db49b/6104ab88/581037615/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "http://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200512_Fauci_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=6+-+Add+your+name+right+away+if+you+support+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200512_Fauci_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200512_Fauci_U1_X1")**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17468316/195424886/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGJkNmUxOC05Yzk0LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zxihQTO1hg6pwT08kengyjauPCtULHs7A0wv-0Awp8Q=&emci=45982473-a093-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=7dbd6e18-9c94-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644) Hi there,

body:
You are receiving this email from 314 Action Fund because you've previously taken part in our efforts. | **On March 6th, Trump claimed:** _" Anyone that needs a test, gets a test."_ -- FALSE

**Yesterday, Trump declared:** _"If somebody wants to be tested right now, they 'll be able to be tested."_ -- STILL FALSE

**Yesterday, Trump also professed:** _" We have met the moment and... prevailed"_ -- What does that even mean?!

Since the beginning, Trump has refused to give the American people the truth about COVID-19. Instead, he paints a rosy, false version of the truth -- **and we 've had enough.**

[Demand that Trump give us real COVID-19 facts instead of his constant lies->](https://secure.314action.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/denounce-pandemic-lies?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+Demand+that+Trump+give+us+real+COVID19+f&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200512_1MC_none_STD_1_Covidlies&source=314_EM_PT_200512_1MC_none_STD_1_Covidlies&refcode=314_EM_PT_200512_1MC_none_STD_1_Covidlies")

| [Demand the Truth](https://secure.314action.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/denounce-pandemic-lies?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+Demand+the+Truth&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200512_1MC_none_STD_1_Covidlies&source=314_EM_PT_200512_1MC_none_STD_1_Covidlies&refcode=314_EM_PT_200512_1MC_none_STD_1_Covidlies")
---

Listen, at some point, every president is tested. When there is a competent adult who is president, that president rises to the occasion and steers the country through a major crisis.

**But Donald Trump is not a competent adult.** Now, we are left with his pseudoscience (LIKE INJECTING BLEACH), lies, and misrepresentations of the truth.

**We need real leadership.**

[Demand that Trump tell the truth and give us the facts around COVID-19->](https://secure.314action.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/denounce-pandemic-lies?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=5+-+Demand+that+Trump+tell+the+truth+and+giv&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200512_1MC_none_STD_1_Covidlies&source=314_EM_PT_200512_1MC_none_STD_1_Covidlies&refcode=314_EM_PT_200512_1MC_none_STD_1_Covidlies")

[Demand the Truth](https://secure.314action.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/denounce-pandemic-lies?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=6+-+Demand+the+Truth&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200512_1MC_none_STD_1_Covidlies&source=314_EM_PT_200512_1MC_none_STD_1_Covidlies&refcode=314_EM_PT_200512_1MC_none_STD_1_Covidlies")

314 Action

314 Action is a grassroots community of over 2.1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb483a/4bd7760e/5bb32615/77aedebd/4116249394/VEsO/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=8+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200512_1MC_none_STD_1_Covidlies&source=314_EM_PT_200512_1MC_none_STD_1_Covidlies")** to make a donation.

name: James Mackler
subject: Trump wants to "terminate health care"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
during a health crisis
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa109/18d6a294/4ca50141/26d60f89/1774377241/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | **BREAKING FROM _THE WASHINGTON POST_ :**
**" We want to terminate health care." \- Donald Trump** | | | [SIGN THE PETITION NOW >>](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa109/18d6a294/4ca50141/26d60ff6/1774377241/VEsE/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200512p_mc")
---
It's unthinkable -- President Trump and his rubber stamps, including **Mitch McConnell** , will stop at nothing to eliminate health care for millions of Americans. Not even a pandemic will get in their way.
Trump will do whatever it takes to destroy the Affordable Care Act, even going against his own advisors. He doubled down and said he will "terminate health care."
[_**We need to fight back by gathering 15,000 signatures for our emergency petition defending the ACA. Will you add your name?**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa109/18d6a294/4ca50141/26d60ff6/1774377241/VEsF/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200512p_mc")
| | [SIGN THE PETITION NOW >>](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa109/18d6a294/4ca50141/26d60ff6/1774377241/VEsC/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200512p_mc")
---
There have been more than **81,000 coronavirus-related deaths** in the U.S., but still, **Trump, Sen. Mitch McConnell, and our opponent, Bill Hagerty, want to "__terminate health care.__"**
There are already an estimated**680,000 Tennesseans who are without insurance** in the middle of a health crisis, but still, **Trump, McConnell, and Hagerty want to "__terminate health care.__"**
There are more than **320,000 Tennesseans who have filed for unemployment** in the wake of the coronavirus and are at risk of losing employer-based insurance, but still, **Trump, Mitch McConnell, and Hagerty want to "__terminate health care__."**
[_**We MUST take a stand against this cruel and un-American action. Add your name and be one of 15,000 grassroots supporters to stand up to the attacks and defend health care for millions of Americans.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa109/18d6a294/4ca50141/26d60ff6/1774377241/VEsD/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200512p_mc")

---
In service,
James

Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Tennessee National Guard, the Department of the Army, or the Department of Defense. This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com. ""
