name: Defeat Disinfo
subject: The truth about Obamagate. (It’s that there is no Obamagate)
body:
The latest page in Trump’s “distract and deflect” playbook | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/HQE/ni0YAA/t.31p/5vag170KQCqB0iZ8cZpgYg/h0/JNCkEEFZowJokrW2UsHTjnWDm8s9fPBOm3K9t7TFUId-2BjWrqqfrUlr5OgQ-2BFTiELT6QYp4m7Wpa-2FEypK86oXiZ2yHJ5A5igv-2FLEbP7dF47PiN37K1JV7d2gzCeJjwvqnkaKsOpaXcilImB2JPQF7eMHd36KTuV8QUB5Pzg9YhJDwJZt8HVOPEkuFNuDIP3e5KZVJm2hbgfCU2KKrPmHXrHZZtr-2BOuav2LquQufDvvGRZj0ns7yWx1iqRxX8QEtMnB91mG7pG0-2BB3AhdgJirLo3RxnNDo-2Fc8WQG2aPA-2Fpfqo-3D/qeq4) Hi Friend,

The country is in crisis. It’s a moment where we truly need steady leadership. What is Donald Trump doing?

He’s inventing a fake controversy about President Obama.

He can’t tell you exactly what Obama did. (Because Obama didn’t actually do anything wrong.) And he’s certainly not putting together a plan to protect Americans’ health and finances by expanding unemployment benefits or improving testing or contact tracing.

So what IS he doing? He’s tweeting the word “OBAMAGATE” over and over and directing precious government resources toward investigating a fictional crime.

**[ Trump doesn’t want to solve the life-and-death problems facing our country — he just wants to distract us from them! Don’t let him get away with it. Share this post from Steve — he's a regular American like you and he's calling Trump out on his lies. ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/HQE/ni0YAA/t.31p/5vag170KQCqB0iZ8cZpgYg/h1/Nejq3qQQ6Jn1R8HM5bnp8LbS3uo1-2BN0t5mBIwfpIi5K5A5qUVD0iiXZt9e91wHwoIsNmGT8NUPNXWc1H4wf2FsWSECVivadu6ue-2BkvGvkoUTFFc0LvwqroX8qyG-2FYeZcAMTxxcqzTg-2Bc1qkFN2QnAZ8U-2F3hk68jTBiY2ytvPHfB4Ogpr0d9JVSTpLzFHElkfWk2odmRm6QQexfaF4qrongwuWTGRa2SpduS3lPkNxnUB5pBBctNttpAmGvvz19IGthBTDRQJ7KEWgSZzuc8yPd-2Bk7ZTrh0a4t7rejSScV-2FcOodg4rhDXULkA9sAnuBgcLL4-2Fz4OaFkrv-2B5OlQstkmg-3D-3D/cZxj) **

[ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/HQE/ni0YAA/t.31p/5vag170KQCqB0iZ8cZpgYg/h2/Nejq3qQQ6Jn1R8HM5bnp8LbS3uo1-2BN0t5mBIwfpIi5K5A5qUVD0iiXZt9e91wHwoIsNmGT8NUPNXWc1H4wf2FhD3d-2BCBrNZ961YibqTCUY-2FjXxeDKERGttc7ltMzNmmfO7NOP7-2BRS0f30CkI-2BYLCKh1Vu6DK2Fc-2FG5tnQ6CAIEKxUMLx228eHQjXUzpN83VP8dCUdGqxTk6QldCe2g5Frig17k0fRCd6rHCHbEVC3mpr6gP6mbYSeezkJutypcODTdxsITWWMoN5xALKkgW4bZMBifinFkLJtIRd6EwR3-2BUmQhCaZGRImgE6fum14d7qtXdZvABiIgBv8KXW4c6Wqg-3D-3D/CHym)
We can understand why Trump wants to distract the American people. Unemployment numbers have climbed higher than they’ve been in nearly 90 years. More than 80,000 Americans have died from COVID-19. These numbers do not reflect well on his leadership.

This latest storm in a teacup is particularly instructive, though, because it’s a classic example of Trump’s distract and deflect communications playbook, so let’s take a deeper dive into how exactly this happened. If you don’t regularly watch Fox News or follow right-wing Twitter accounts, you may be surprised at what you see here.

**Step 1. Trump hunts for a distraction.** Unemployment and COVID-19 death rates soar. Rather than trying to solve the problem, Trump turns to his most reliable source of disinformation and tweets a story from Fox News in the hopes of distracting the American people.

**Step 2. Trump makes his own truth through repetition.** Over the course of one day, Trump tweeted more than 100 times, often using the word “OBAMAGATE” over and over. Here are just a few examples:

**Step 3. The disinformation returns to its source as a “real” news story.** High-profile right-wing accounts (many of which are bots) begin to amplify the message, driving #Obamagate to the top of the trending list, which then makes it a “worthwhile” story for Fox News and other right-wing media to report on (even though they were the source of the “news” to begin with), amplifying it even further.

**Step 4. Accuse the media and social platforms of hiding the truth.** An apparent change in the way Twitter counted the number of posts mentioning #Obamagate spurred a fresh round of conspiracy theories about a cover up, giving Trump the opportunity to express outrage and drive even more attention away from the unemployment and COVID-19 numbers.

**[Step 5. We fight back. The best way to beat disinformation is to drown it out with the truth — share Steve’s post about Trump's transparent lies to make sure the American people stay focused on what actually matters: our lives and our livelihoods! ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/HQE/ni0YAA/t.31p/5vag170KQCqB0iZ8cZpgYg/h3/Nejq3qQQ6Jn1R8HM5bnp8LbS3uo1-2BN0t5mBIwfpIi5K5A5qUVD0iiXZt9e91wHwoIsNmGT8NUPNXWc1H4wf2FnaPlxamYV7S7CAti5-2BRWmSnpZfaM8yF1J9qZ-2Fn51uZrzOW8g3-2FOCDOcpnZCbc1OUiPQ5tjirfbElzxoYPXGVLzOUFq0idZawwOd6-2BFZT2pBrQMQhNezkeeX-2FSCtL3Ynux5tRD8YwFv1feZLeqMQoc-2F4N9ZptgLseP89ahshL7MWgC5yqW1t0L2kmIQOPLdyJnWvanPuiDX-2BcXf1M7Qi-2F6G5YA-2BePu9ApOuI5Rt8XEzEA20z0xhtMGsfFv0jkfi04Q-3D-3D/no5Q) **

Thanks for going down that rabbit hole with us — and for doing your part to take the truth to Trump’s door so we can send him back to Mar-a-Lago this November.

The Defeat Disinfo Team

P.S. Fighting against Trump’s disinformation campaigns costs money. We know times are tough right now, but, if you can, **[chip in $5 to make sure Trump is a one-term president and competent leaders can start repairing the mess that he’s made.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/HQE/ni0YAA/t.31p/5vag170KQCqB0iZ8cZpgYg/h4/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNII0-2Bssn41oEhsR47MncZ3Syi7M8pf0F4wg9lz5P9WjLZPhLmrK8cFAOBQqFUOLlRM1ifrKq88VOm8jHwawVfGH4gMpYkgtnqd-2B1ad5nCU7YNpOjs3lvx2Y7MhVcRI4ytPw2jnhmDEwLc09YurR9aIBHP-2Fln2bMPU6x8E8M4nrfgpiH4GQh9hXNnFAEor7ysrEVz03seD3tDAaon6-2BFXQ6joWYuZKgf36S6EE-2FtRfiQClLEhIP2ZLd7Top6L1mAhcS0sUMl59AnHeXbTHJsbmjvjk20Z3aTBsdhstGxGqrAx-2FqfJcW5mov74-2F-2Bura10P77SdqgbNHrTX1FLlHPQygi-2Fun4Z9LLzr6fR7H62g5bWBCjra0ZFm0kEPBTq0mFPyAiY7jX4rcntC-2BNHJB-2FBYCoSOVAQ9A-2F-2BghOQn4Se2On3Ag-3D-3D/tgh6)**

_If you were forwarded this email, you can subscribe to receive these weekly action updates on how to fight Trump's lies[here](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/HQE/ni0YAA/t.31p/5vag170KQCqB0iZ8cZpgYg/h5/JNCkEEFZowJokrW2UsHTjnWDm8s9fPBOm3K9t7TFUIeLF2yp97wbWjj3WOEnX2RH5yh57QLWEWmQgWDgmBC9hOoQshBuUU8oeNQzeJAmVtiF4EkNRcbzJkr0qVS0PEBecO17ccDlH9pfKE5jVBciAUnsmOU3SSHeKxJOR-2B9oMNJUGDqNqOnDw3nJTrKGbVR5i0Y3RjeHHB8BSDVQiBGPmFTEJyMK6wiv2rJFmQwGmPlKmYDvKnhOMK-2FdLhyhPcKYAzK79wgVRZQZrcANsiMjcNkaaQlMbUaNzHElQhQtSR4-3D/b1PT)._

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Kyle=20Hupfer?=
subject: 2020 Indiana Republican Convention Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Indiana Republican Party
body:
I write today to all Indiana Republicans, but with a special focus to those who will serve as a delegate to our Party’s State Convention. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/2020-indiana-republican-convention-update?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6a93e9d49a&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| Dear Indiana Republicans,

I write today to all Indiana Republicans, but with a special focus to those who will serve as a delegate to our Party’s State Convention.

The disruptions to life due to COVID-19 have been widespread and the traditional operations of campaigns and our party are not immune.

One blessing through this has been the continued support of Republicans across the state. Because of your support, we are going to come out of the pandemic in a very strong position.

Unfortunately for all of us who would much prefer an in-person convention, **COVID-19 and the necessary regulations related to large gatherings will prevent us from having an in-person convention this year.**

The biggest issue the State Committee has been working on is the impact COVID-19 could have on our state convention. **The focus from day 1 for our Party was to ensure that our delegates select our nominees for lieutenant governor and attorney general.**

To make sure our delegates’ voices are heard, [the state committee developed a plan](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=42f101b5ec&e=1acd9bb3d6) to have delegates vote by mail. That alternative plan was approved by a unanimous vote of the state committee after weeks of deliberation and planning.

With respect to the convention, our goal is to remotely provide delegates with as many aspects of a traditional convention as possible. To accomplish that, we have partnered with WISH-TV, which will produce, broadcast and livestream the convention.

The convention will be broadcast live from their studios from **5:30 p.m. to 7:00 p.m. on June 18 th.** Additionally, the broadcast will be shared broadly afterwards so that any delegate who misses the live broadcast will still be able to view it.

As a bonus, any other Hoosier who wants to see it will be able to tune in and hear the Republican message from our leaders.

**The broadcast will contain all the major components of an in-person convention: **
* The opportunity for each candidate for attorney general to speak to this statewide audience.
* Lieutenant Governor Suzanne Crouch will speak to her commitment to serve a second term.
* Governor Holcomb will deliver the keynote address, outlining his vision for the next four years of our state.

Traditionally, in multiple candidate races, votes would happen in rounds until the top vote getter receives a majority (50% plus 1) of all votes cast. That meant that if no candidate receives that required vote total after a round of voting, the lowest vote getter is dropped, and another round of voting occurs.

In order to best replicate this process by mail:
* The ballot will allow each delegate to indicate his or her top choice.
* As long as that top choice remains an option, the delegate’s vote is cast for that candidate.
* The ballot will also allow, but does not require, a delegate to pick who they would vote for if their top candidate is dropped.
* If a delegate wants to only select one candidate, that candidate receives that vote as long as they are a candidate.
* Once dropped, if no other choices are selected by a delegate, that delegate’s ballot is no longer cast.

Delegates will receive additional information about the ballot and the voting process over the next few weeks.
* **Ballots will arrive to delegates around June 22, 2020.**
* **The deadline to receive returned ballots is July 9 th at 5:00 p.m. **

Due to the change in convention format, **the Indiana Republican Party is lowering the delegate fee from $100 to $50.** This fee helps cover the cost of administering the election. Those delegates who have already paid the $100 delegate fee will be contacted soon regarding your $50 refund.

**To ensure the sanctity of the election process, a third-party vendor has been selected to produce and directly mail the ballots to delegates.** The delegate list will be certified, as usual, by an independent credentials committee. An accounting firm has been hired to receive the voted ballots directly from delegates and you will see their name and address on the addressed and postage paid return envelopes. Finally, the accounting firm will certify receipt and deliver all ballots to a designated counting location on July 10th.

Each candidate will be able to designate watchers to be in the count room. **To maintain delegate vote anonymity, ballots will be separated from envelopes before they are counted.**

I am certain that you share my disappointment that we will not be able to gather as a party in person for convention. The State Committee waited as long as possible to make this decision and looked at a number of alternatives including using multiple locations around the state, a delay of the convention, or an online convention. In the end, with a deadline of July 15 to certify our results and the uncertainty of restrictions caused by the virus, the only process that we felt had the certainty of having our delegates select our candidates is the mail-in election that we unanimously agreed upon.

**Neither I nor the state committee was willing to risk a scenario where delegates would not get the chance to vote.

As a party, we must do what we can to ensure our delegates are involved in the nomination process.** **Their voice and their vote should determine who the Republican nominees for lieutenant governor and attorney general are in 2020.**

If circumstances allow and we can do it in a safe and secure manner, we will have a big party on Election Night with everyone invited. This will, at long last, be a chance for us all to gather and celebrate another historic night for Indiana Republicans!

Thank you,
Chairman Kyle Hupfer
---
| | | | | | | [](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0411f64871&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=651c5dfe95&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c02dbf5f65&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
| | _Copyright © 2020, All rights reserved.
Paid for by Indiana Republican Party
Authorized by Indiana Republican Party.

You are receiving this email because you are a supporter of Indiana Republican Party_

**Our mailing address is:**
_Indiana Republican Party_

Indianapolis, IN 46204

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=352d8be5a9&e=1acd9bb3d6) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=95163e2650&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---

| This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[_why did I get this?_](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/about?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=70b6cdf951&e=1acd9bb3d6&c=fa413e84f7) [unsubscribe from this list](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=70b6cdf951&e=1acd9bb3d6&c=fa413e84f7) [update subscription preferences](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/profile?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=70b6cdf951&e=1acd9bb3d6)

name: Mike Bloomberg
subject: We have to protect American workers
body:
To safely restart businesses, Congress must act

| _You're receiving this email because of your participation with Mike Bloomberg 2020. We'll be sending you updates like this on initiatives and issues we think you'll be interested in. Thank you!_ [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=fb69b92e40dd4d32a3a3f34430db12d7&_e=IhWjwiQxfdVOeFfMgFKKmYkXgDE_HbWjZT8CHtgwddhH5V_cwNXZPQb6_754hWNHSJCvC85bce4t1-WJSzzfm1UdBDp9RxBO_0mqgOYArAXfNNWj0OvA6c6_H9lfsqIlqMjWLEV-KGZ9j7QU0BC9mOi7mjRsh02kXn18sekL-AGhKYRkS8C__dGpauusVGM_OdLjAKhXr9vhPzmnMtAE4A1yLCHTt8EQy9N8rD9cbxaVrkyE76OIFnIxR7yxPNfFUlVa5ZGLhCGokMtkhtFRxOar7uvrgjBMakVP9IeI9UlCeaLc7uL67PPR32ottHDg) Friend, As more places move to reopen their economies, we need Congress to do more to protect workers -- and here's how they should start: **[https://www.bloomberg.com/opinion/articles/2020-05-11/companies-need-safety-from-lawsuits-if-they-protect-workers](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=fb69b92e40dd4d32a3a3f34430db12d7&_e=IhWjwiQxfdVOeFfMgFKKmfEPoO7rVOCJdTwLKo9VUxAA9umdH_WZMLRYaGKTg6FuhGFwrDY00wi4CFu4U7cKMToI_vjkS9jemyTVCGsF0AGjDhxNcNZKnb-oOtipOwxmTx15hEgVNIMKFHtV7rbMUn0v7cO5t_rP3aJqfR53TWFQKGnotixlfHd6M4z94s-gDjolApmxgf6HrpXvQJDrbEVTUcKuALFUL8aFgUmucf7vgl1hGAV2n4zMVsakA1mMzR9NcaesUFDG02UzrewSj7iwpfFDf3Tqi4uaEoFdDDxU-ITxMo9k93VKDb20CI4mlqEyYbSBx-PVqz3yCidlow0tHeOu1xXD8Gvc5yDoHIAaT9VXf3ptxSyc8Bu9EREPpZJW-3lgh-UXzq6WjeAdaKqREAvWY-I8xV5pwmdqhjmsdI6kyU1rDdDT-xaBq92uPPhG4VWBexClStjzTovV8g%3D%3D)** We know that workplaces are potential hotbeds for infection. Thousands of American health care workers have come down with COVID-19, and nearly 200 meat processing plants have had outbreaks, infecting 11,500 people. Cashiers and others have been hard hit, too. It's essential that companies take action to protect their employees, and that they have clear guidance and support on how to do so. For that to happen all across the country, we need Congress to act. This week I wrote about how Congress can spur businesses to protect workers, and you can read about it here: [**https://www.bloomberg.com/opinion/articles/2020-05-11/companies-need-safety-from-lawsuits-if-they-protect-workers**](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=fb69b92e40dd4d32a3a3f34430db12d7&_e=IhWjwiQxfdVOeFfMgFKKmfEPoO7rVOCJdTwLKo9VUxAA9umdH_WZMLRYaGKTg6FuhGFwrDY00wi4CFu4U7cKMToI_vjkS9jemyTVCGsF0AGjDhxNcNZKnb-oOtipOwxmTx15hEgVNIMKFHtV7rbMUn0v7cO5t_rP3aJqfR53TWFQKGnotixlfHd6M4z94s-gDjolApmxgf6HrpXvQJDrbEVTUcKuALFUL8aFgUmucf7vgl1hGAV2n4zMVsakA1mMiMIU0TqlvD6y0c0u5RkuiiYWzovJkukR4wVC4YrpSGWcSsHyTLJtzBO6LSGu309Rye-ZVkCOuagF3IJbIjTlv6OQPX4GS5smdFAOybQJ7IINqafma9dr3VDbw-yv5pZ8V0oEDwZ37CNYe06OmrP0nGSqLkHkbT4a7xxjQ3KdXhybYnycpU0KWDRztZiFVOPoBIjy_ZlC3s31IIRuNCuIdw%3D%3D) To enable American businesses to survive, hire employees, and get our economy moving again, we need common sense measures to protect American workers. Thanks, Mike Bloomberg

---

| [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=fb69b92e40dd4d32a3a3f34430db12d7&_e=IhWjwiQxfdVOeFfMgFKKmS1xIWqErf9Dp2tZ3edMGxQi7ULdBtS7S8G5xF_Uho8ZACJhJptU-xjjVmFm8arKbbrf_rCMZsAz6ExVGH33mFIZtVbJ5yV_ItZ8tvzQkgayVoP9BynTYEUI1WUbAGvxKBf60E2I-1_1HeLx5VjS8S2Y3LCTAowwz_utapO5yB-MVeczRFMp5luuhFYRaEfFYRq2fIRK2MyoCt87op1Mof9wCWzPZjghQM5rAdlgOFWx3sA6T0cHXPB73hVtAmWYxHqICjPdKaZ6uy4Puu0NHT0%3D) | | [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=fb69b92e40dd4d32a3a3f34430db12d7&_e=IhWjwiQxfdVOeFfMgFKKmdMvlwk_Wf_cL_QqP33ZCEvinskDlK_DovPmSd55TKtnQzpD6fGMdB3jseCjbNXQLAODiNlDpnyroU7AJ-bHWrNywNqP59m0FE5s_qReB13rk7h2VehHI_sGsTtypc0t0IbgsVmzn7mwnK36ZY1F4Sbx1pGQYbaSriWe2kBW-EC5uOLvNWFvImfv9AoL5x6FnzoIyKlSbyJJ1cMFGdtz4y1TrSK9s9lRw1fWim1u8JqCzM5RSRkp20epLa8O3uBuGg%3D%3D) | | [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=fb69b92e40dd4d32a3a3f34430db12d7&_e=IhWjwiQxfdVOeFfMgFKKmcd2YZEW73XQotOzGms51SL048R6dbU3xKcJZlmBIAQ76svJHxPk2sM7n4m244gczWMyTky8uSL7Zm0N1ft1bqydmdgJMZTSARJ3Icw6L55HRdeLhLfTGJnjFclKLpA2ZCv-MuX8yNabVSr_rlc69UQOhDo3BPrlun-Cg_OCaOrk0WVXpEbGQcAAmYD6bhPb7_JuG_7SuzYuzus-Mv5W5Yq95A_ylvWRQ9b2jrL9aYsajXt7Lde0pOZCtfrIKaN8rNl7P7VKzCOT1VkPv1QJWQQ%3D)
---|---|---|---|---

name: Team Christy (Lexie, Kunal, Andrea, Mallory, Brandon, and everyone)
subject: This is the very last fundraising email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Hi Peter,

This is the very last fundraising email we will send you before the polls close for our special election.

Right now, every single member of our team and our volunteer community is calling and texting voters in CA-25 to make sure they return their ballots TODAY in this critical special election.

We are fighting with everything we've got. **And while the end is in sight, we could use a last-minute surge of support to keep our phone lines up, our digital ads firing, and our tech going as we fight to turn out every single vote.**

**[So we're asking, one last time before this is all over, will you pitch in $5 or more to bring home the win?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbc0/29776869/99790b7/569f16bc/1084666809/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTJfbGFzdEZSLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200512_lastFR-full")**

This race is so pivotal that even late yesterday the LA Times published an editorial saying, "We encourage voters to ignore the partisan noise and simply vote for the objectively superior candidate, Smith. **And do it now.** "

We're asking you for the same support -- to donate to fuel this campaign, **and do it now before it's too late.**

**[Pitch in $5 or whatever you can afford. Every cent will be spent _immediately._ ](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbc0/29776869/99790b7/569f16bc/1084666809/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTJfbGFzdEZSLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200512_lastFR-full")**

Thank you. We've been proud to be in this fight with you every step of the way.

Let's finish this together,

\-- Lexie, Kunal, Andrea, Mallory, Brandon, and all of Team Christy [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbc0/29776869/99790b7/569f16bc/1084666809/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTJfbGFzdEZSLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200512_lastFR-full")
_The number one priority during this time is to make sure everyone helps mitigate the spread of COVID-19 in California and across the country. Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win._ |
---|---|---

| | Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress.
---|---
|
This email was sent by **[Christy Smith](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbc0/29776869/99790b7/569f16bd/1084666809/VEsC/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/")**
777 S. Figueroa Street, Suite 4050, Los Angeles, CA 90017-5864.

If you no longer want to hear from Christy Smith, [**click here to get off all our lists instantly.**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbc0/29776869/99790b7/569f16be/1084666809/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Questions or concerns? name: Save =?utf-8?b?TWlubmVzb3Rh4oCZcw==?= Senate Seat
subject: Holy cow!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Holy cow, folks! We just got word that Donald Trump’s campaign and the Republican National Committee raised $61.7 million in April alone. Altogether, they’re beginning this general election with more than $255 million in cash on hand — a _massive_ advantage. With this huge new pile of cash, you can be sure millions more will be dumped into key battleground states across the country, including right here in Minnesota — where Trump lost by just 1.5 points in 2016. **Can you rush $10 or more to help us gather the resources we need to fight back and stop Trump from flipping Minnesota red? name: CoryBooker.com
subject: Add your name to join Cory's call for a ban on price gouging during this crisis
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
body:
Here's what Cory is doing to protect you during this crisis. |
#
Team, In just the first few weeks of the coronavirus crisis alone, the state of New Jersey received 4,000+ complaints of price hikes on essential items like face masks, hand sanitizer, and disinfectants. **That 's why Cory introduced a bill in the Senate to protect consumers everywhere by making it illegal to unreasonably increase prices on essential items during emergencies.** [**If you agree that the last thing consumers should be worried about during any crisis is falling victim to price gouging, add your name today to stand with Cory and his legislation banning this cruel practice.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://act.corybooker.com/page/s/2020-may-ban-price-gouging?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&City=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [SIGN THE PETITION ](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/2020-may-ban-price-gouging?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&City=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
His legislation -- the Prevent Emergency and Disaster Profiteering Act -- would set thresholds on how much companies and individuals would be allowed to increase prices once a disaster strikes.
There is currently no federal law banning the practice of profiteering in a crisis, so Cory's legislation will protect consumers in states without anti-price gouging laws on the books.
[**If you 're with Cory on this important issue, we need you to sign this petition today.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://act.corybooker.com/page/s/2020-may-ban-price-gouging?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&City=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
[SIGN THE PETITION ](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/2020-may-ban-price-gouging?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&City=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
Team Booker

PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
---

Hey there!

Georgette has been on the front lines addressing the on-going Coronavirus crisis. She has been leading San Diego's response, enacting one of the first eviction moratoriums in the country and fighting for disadvantaged communities access to resources.

The crisis has also made it clearer than ever that having experienced, empathetic leadership in Congress to support local leaders and their communities. That's why here at campaign HQ, we need to stay focused on getting Georgette to Congress.

We wanted to invite you to a virtual discussion and grassroots fundraiser next week. We'll fill you in on the state of the race, and let you know all the ways you can support the campaign. The event will be held live via Zoom.

**If you can't attend, please consider[making a contribution](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17469675/195474423/1147193815?refcode=em-200512-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmQ0MDkxYS1iNTk0LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ggXxUWZ6AY8u06tfIFb44cYJGumfjcb6Kt_xbJ7nO_Y=) of any amount to support our campaign. We have a major mid-quarter fundraising deadline on Friday. With in-person fundraisers cancelled, we need all the support we can get.**

Thanks so much!

Alex Obolensky
Deputy Campaign Manager

subject: 18326 Post office under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
|
---
[ ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d049f/72412298/4f22fea1/6104abe9/1334428336/VEsH/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200512_PostAttack_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200512_PostAttack_U1_X1")

| | The post office in is collapsing in front of our very eyes, Peter **The post office in 18326 is collapsing in front of our very eyes, Peter -- and our democracy is on the line.** [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d049f/72412298/4f22fea1/6104abe8/1334428336/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200512_PostAttack_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200512_PostAttack_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200512_PostAttack_U1_X1") Primary elections across this country are currently running via vote-by-mail -- and as Democrats push to make November's election vote-by-mail they're running into a _Republican roadblock_. **The GOP is DISMANTLING the post office and UNDERMINING vote-by-mail in a DESPERATE effort to save President Trump and their Senate majority.** The USPS is "a literal lifeline" for American elections at this moment. **So, we 're taking a stand by asking 10,000 of our digital supporters to sign a petition to Save the Post Office. [Can we count on you to be one of those signatures?](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d049f/72412298/4f22fea1/6104abeb/1334428336/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200512_PostAttack_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+Can+we+count+on+you+to+be+one+of+those+s&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200512_PostAttack_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200512_PostAttack_U1_X1")** [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d049f/72412298/4f22fea1/6104abea/1334428336/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200512_PostAttack_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200512_PostAttack_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200512_PostAttack_U1_X1") _We need 250 signatures from Pennsylvania!_ Post offices aren't being attacked because of "mail delivery" \-- but because during the pandemic they've become the backbone of American democracy. **That 's why President Trump and his Republican party have spent the last few months destroying the foundation of the post office:**
* The President called the post office "a joke".
* Trump said he would VETO any coronavirus bill with funding for the post office.
* The new Postmaster General is a loyal Trump donor and crony.
* The RNC has $20 million to fight lawsuits on vote-by-mail.

_Peter Republicans are throwing everything they 've got at the Post Office in hopes it will crumble quietly._ They've got a new thing coming -- our grassroots digital supporters are fighting back! [**We 're hoping we can count on you to help us by being one of our 10,000 signatures! Will you sign our petition today?**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d049f/72412298/4f22fea1/6104abed/1334428336/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200512_PostAttack_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=5+-+Wersquore+hoping+we+can+count+on+you+to+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200512_PostAttack_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200512_PostAttack_U1_X1") | | | [Sign on to Save the Post Office NOW! >>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d049f/72412298/4f22fea1/6104abec/1334428336/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200512_PostAttack_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=6+-+Sign+on+to+Save+the+Post+Office+NOW+gtgt&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200512_PostAttack_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200512_PostAttack_U1_X1")
---
_We need 250 signatures from Pennsylvania!_
Thanks for your swift action!
_\-- the Voter Protection Project_

| [Voter Protection Project](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d049f/72412298/4f22fea1/6104abef/1334428336/VEsB/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=7+-+Voter+Protection+Project&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200512_PostAttack_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200512_PostAttack_U1_X1")

---

We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d049f/72412298/4f22fea1/6104abd1/1334428336/VEsP/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://voterprotect.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/less-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=9+-+click+here&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200512_PostAttack_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200512_PostAttack_U1_X1")
If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, [click here.](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d049f/72412298/4f22fea1/6104abd0/1334428336/VEsHBQ/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://voterprotect.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=10+-+click+here&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200512_PostAttack_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200512_PostAttack_U1_X1")

name: Team Hill
subject: Calling All CD-5 Republicans: Your Voice Matters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAVID HILL FOR OKLAHOMA, INC | | [](http://links
body:
We are officially less than 50 days away from the 5th District primary Peter, We are officially **less than 50 days away** from the 5th District primary, and as the countdown to election night begins, our campaign is firing on all cylinders. We can't thank you enough for your support over these past few months.
The stakes are extremely high in this race, as **this congressional seat could determine if Nancy Pelosi remains Speaker and Democrats retain their majority in the House of Representatives!** If we are going to unseat Democrat Kendra Horn, flip the House, and make CD-5 **RED** again, we _need_ supporters like you to make your voice known this election season. If you haven't yet heard, the Oklahoma 5th Congressional District Republican Party is conducting **a _NEW_ online poll that closes at 5:00 PM tomorrow, Wednesday, May 13th**: _If you were going to vote today, which candidate would you vote for?_ Please show your support for my campaign by clicking the button below or by sending an email to **[dewayne@okgop.com](mailto:dewayne@okgop.com)**. All you have to include in the message is your answer to the question above. And please, ONLY VOTE ONCE. If you vote more than once, your voice won't be taken into account. [ **CLICK HERE to Vote for David Hill in the _NEW_ Poll** ](mailto:dewayne@okgop.com?subject=CD-5%20Straw%20Poll&body=I%20support%20David%20Hill%20to%20be%20the%20CD-5%20Republican%20Party's%20nominee%20and%20defeat%20Democrat%20Kendra%20Horn%20in%20the%20general%20election.) **You can also show your support by donating to our campaign**. We can't thank you enough for your support over these past few months. The stakes are extremely high in this race, as this congressional seat could determine if Nancy Pelosi remains Speaker and Democrats retain their majority in the House of Representatives! If we are going to unseat Democrat Kendra Horn, flip the House, and make CD-5 RED again, we need supporters like you to make your voice known this election season. If you haven't yet heard, the Oklahoma 5th Congressional District Republican Party is conducting a NEW online poll that closes at 5:00 PM tomorrow, Wednesday, May 13th: If you were going to vote today, which candidate would you vote for? Please show your support for my campaign by clicking the button below or by sending an email to mailto:dewayne@okgop.com. All you have to include in the message is your answer to the question above. And please, ONLY VOTE ONCE. If you vote more than once, your voice won't be taken into account. mailto:dewayne@okgop.com?subject=CD-5%20Straw%20Poll&body=I%20support%20David%20Hill%20to%20be%20the%20CD-5%20Republican%20Party's%20nominee%20and%20defeat%20Democrat%20Kendra%20Horn%20in%20the%20general%20election. subject: Here’s the plan:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Powered By People

The
COVID-19 crisis reveals exactly why we need new leadership, which means we
need to get to work immediately.

Texas is one of worst states in the country in COVID-19 testing, and even
before this pandemic we were last in access to health care. We can do
better. That’s one major reason why Powered by People is launching an
aggressive voter registration effort (read our full plan below). But right
now, we don’t have enough volunteers.

Will you be part of launching this critical effort? Sign up for a virtual
phonebank with Beto now.

Upcoming events:

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-registration/34367/signup/?source=ema20200512-88876&t=1001&akid=88876%2E444211%2EDlN5T5 ]Virtual Voter Registration Phone Bank
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-registration/34367/signup/?source=ema20200512-88876&t=1002&akid=88876%2E444211%2EDlN5T5 ]Monday, May 18, 6:30 PM CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-registration/34367/signup/?source=ema20200512-88876&t=1003&akid=88876%2E444211%2EDlN5T5 ]Get more info or RSVP »

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-registration/34366/signup/?source=ema20200512-88876&t=1001&akid=88876%2E444211%2EDlN5T5 ]Virtual Voter Registration Phone Bank
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-registration/34366/signup/?source=ema20200512-88876&t=1002&akid=88876%2E444211%2EDlN5T5 ]Thursday, May 21, 6:30 PM CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-registration/34366/signup/?source=ema20200512-88876&t=1003&akid=88876%2E444211%2EDlN5T5 ]Get more info or RSVP »

We’ve
got a 3-part plan to win, and right now we’re at part 1:

1. Register Democratic voters: Hundreds of thousands of known Democrats
have moved to Texas and are not yet registered in this state. As we
all know, Texas does not make it easy to register or to vote. We need
to grow the electorate to win.

2. Contact voters in key State House districts: We will use phonebanks
and relational organizing tools to provide important voting
information until we can safely knock on doors again.

3. Turn out every Democratic voter in Texas: This is the final all-out
push to win the State House and stop Trump by delivering one of the
biggest electoral college prizes in the country (38 electoral college
votes) to the Democratic nominee.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42494?source=ema20200512-88876&t=1004&akid=88876%2E444211%2EDlN5T5 ]Calling huge numbers of unregistered Democratic voters is critical to
our success. Sign up to join Beto now.

Thank you,

The Powered by People team

P.S. If you can’t volunteer, please contribute to fund our organizing
across the state.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42500?refcode=ema20200512-88876&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=88876%2E444211%2EDlN5T5 ]Contribute $3

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=88876%2E444211%2EDlN5T5

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump listened to the experts—not the media
body:
Just a short while ago, Press Secretary Kayleigh McEnany set the record straight. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=68c8e4f873&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • May 12, 2020
---
| | |
# **President Trump listened to the experts—not the media**

**Just a short while ago,** Press Secretary Kayleigh McEnany set the record straight.

**“I want to highlight** three critical aspects of President Trump’s response to the Coronavirus that have exceeded the media’s expectations and should inspire confidence in every American across this country,” she said during today’s press conference.

🎬 [_Press Secretary: The real story on ventilators, N95 respirators, and testing_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7b020b628b&e=3ee4985eea)

**First was ventilators**. Some pundits said America needed 1 million of them to survive the Coronavirus and claimed we’d face a major shortage. “In fact, it’s encouraging to be able to say that every single American who has needed a ventilator has received a ventilator,” McEnany said.

**Under President Trump** , America is manufacturing 100,000 ventilators in just 100 days—three times the number that are typically produced in an entire _year_.

**Next was N95 respirators**. The Trump Administration has now shipped over 90 million of these protective devices across the country. Once again, that triples the healthcare industry consumption level for an ordinary year in just a few months.

**And finally, testing** —a topic full of misleading and outright false media information. As President Trump announced yesterday, America is [closing in on 10 million Coronavirus tests](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1b033b45bb&e=3ee4985eea) performed thus far. That number leads the world, and it’s not close.

**“For weeks** , the media cited South Korea as being the gold standard for testing,” McEnany said. “But as it stands, we are now testing at a higher rate per capita.”

🇺🇸 [No other country comes close on testing! ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ca78ab4300&e=3ee4985eea)

**How did it happen?** President Trump mobilized a massive private-sector response, slashing red tape to allow for quick innovation and development. He made sure private labs were seen as part of the _solution_ , not as a problem for Washington to manage.

**So far** **during this pandemic** , the FDA has granted 92 emergency use authorizations for Coronavirus tests. That’s more EUAs than were issued during the H1N1, Avian flu, MERS, Ebola, Enterovirus, and Zika outbreaks combined.

**As a result** , our nation’s testing capacity skyrocketed. Americans can now get a result in as little as 5 minutes and even collect samples without having to leave their own homes.

**“Three weeks ago** , we were conducting roughly 150,000 tests per day,” President Trump said from the Rose Garden yesterday. “Now we’re doing approximately 300,000 tests per day—a 100 percent increase—and it will go up substantially from that number.”

**🎬 Watch: **[More than 240 test sites helping our underserved communities](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b4e4f9ecf2&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## 🏗 **See the wall being built!**

**The wall is going up.** Just as President Trump pledged, his Administration is working hard to stop illegal immigration at the border—before it spills over into our communities.

**Now, there’s a new way** to watch that progress unfold.

🎥 [See the wall being built!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fe3b0247d7&e=3ee4985eea)

**U.S. Customs and Border Protection** has launched a page on its website showing highlights of this construction. You’ll find the latest footage from different sectors along our southern border, as well as a map to see where new barrier has gone up so far.

**Construction is going smoothly** and keeping on schedule. By the end of this year, the Trump Administration is set to have built nearly 450 miles of border wall.

**Promise kept!**
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump delivers remarks on Coronavirus testing capacity** | May 11, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=880c65f099&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6619a60d40&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=9a5a094926)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---
